objects.title: [META] Flash Step Legs (Bleach)
objects.text: Your legs master Shunpo (Flash Step) from Bleach. You gain: the ability to move faster than the eye can follow (effectively teleport for short distances, up to 50 miles per step), supernatural balance (you can stand on any surface, including vertical walls and air), and the ability to perform 'afterimages' — leave illusory copies of yourself as you move. With mastery, you can take 100 steps in a second.

objects.title: [META] Sage Mode Legs (Naruto)
objects.text: Your legs master Sage Mode movement from Naruto. You gain: natural energy-enhanced physical abilities (10× speed, strength, durability), the ability to sense all living things within a mile (you perceive them as glowing auras even through walls), and the Frog Kata martial art — your strikes gain an invisible extension (you can hit targets a foot beyond your reach) and your kicks carry natural energy that disrupts chakra.

objects.title: [META] Spider-Man Legs (Marvel)
objects.text: Your legs gain Spider-Man's powers from Marvel Comics. You gain: superhuman strength in your legs (kick through steel, leap 50 feet vertically), the ability to stick to any surface (walk on walls and ceilings), perfect balance (you cannot be knocked over), and a spider-sense that warns you of danger 2 seconds before it happens. Your legs also generate web-shooters (organic, no need for devices).

objects.title: [META] Beast Titan Legs (AoT)
objects.text: Your legs can transform into Beast Titan legs from Attack on Titan. You can: transform your lower body into that of the Beast Titan (20 feet tall, incredibly strong, capable of throwing objects with the force of artillery), throw projectiles with supernatural accuracy (you can hit a target a mile away with a stone), and command Pure Titans within a mile (they obey your mental commands).

objects.title: [META] Cyborg Ninja Legs (MGR)
objects.text: Your legs become fully cybernetic — Raiden-style from Metal Gear Rising. You gain: superhuman speed (run at 200 mph), superhuman jumping (leap 200 feet), the ability to run on walls and ceilings (magnetic gripping), High-Frequency Blade combat (your kicks can parry and deflect any blade), and the ability to enter 'Ripper Mode' (10× speed and strength, time appears to slow).

objects.title: [META] Dimensional Step Legs (D&D)
objects.text: Your legs gain the Dimension Door spell from Dungeons & Dragons. You can: teleport to any location you can see (line of sight) at will, teleport to any location you've previously visited (within 100 miles), and bring along anything you're carrying or anyone you're touching. Each teleport is instantaneous and silent. You can also teleport out of grapples, restraints, or any physical confinement.

rows.title: Legs
rows.titleText: Legs, not much downsides to losing sensitivity in them, unless you're one of them.. So to right such a wrong, downsides will be far more grand.

objects.title: Overlord's Chest
objects.text: With this the red tribe will bow to you. The red minions, weaker than the warrior ones, will be able to cast strong fire magic and are not just immune to flames but can absorb fire to heal themselves. Good for quickly cleaning up a spot for your lot to build a castle at. you can breathe a cone of fire hot enough to melt steel (30-meter cone). You also gain immunity to fire and the ability to absorb flames to heal.

objects.title: Anti-Chest
objects.text:
I can turn the anti-christ into a torso and put him into you. This will give you the ability to turn some of the most vile people in your reality into your demonic thralls, though you will have to make a deal with their souls before they become your demons. Up to seven demonic thralls at a time, each granted a unique infernal power.
You can also open minor hellgates — portals to a personal pocket-dimension that serves as your thralls' home and your prison for enemies.

addons.title: Patchwork Pantheon
addons.text: Oh, their souls still linger and now they have reawakened. Whenever you wish you can summon three ghostly specters, the last bits of the Greek Gods. They will teach you how to harvest their powers and tell you about their adventures, ironically Ares will have the least despicable stories.

objects.title: Ares' Rage
objects.text:
Such a boring one, no tricks, only honor. With this chest, whenever you enter a battle you will slowly build up strength — in just one minute, if you were just a normal human, your body would have the strength of steel. After five minutes, you can bench-press a truck. After ten, a building. There is no upper cap — as long as the battle continues, your strength continues to climb.
Your durability scales with your strength, and your wounds close slowly during combat (minor wounds in minutes, major wounds in hours)

objects.title: Beelzebub's stomach
objects.text:
Oh, he was oh so. well, not kind, but one day a new religion came about and he became the ruler of the deadly sin of gluttony! This comes with two powers: when walking amongst the fields they shall grow a hundred times the harvest, when walking amongst the faithful you shall gain rulership over the flies and the corrupt.
You can also consume ANY organic matter (including poisons, diseases, and rotten food) without harm — it all nourishes you. you can 'Devour' — consume a single object or creature smaller than yourself whole, gaining a permanent minor trait from it.

objects.title: Creator's Ribs
objects.text: With this you'll have your very own little afterlife inside your chest — one with a small island and a never-ending ocean. You can store as many souls in there as you like (they remain conscious, in a paradise suited to their desires). You can also enter this afterlife yourself at will (your body falls into a coma while you're inside); you can pull a single soul from the afterlife and resurrect them (if their body is available or you have enough soul-stuff to fashion a new one)

objects.title: Soul of Meliae
objects.text:
This one began to cry when the thunder bringer died. I granted it mercy. Allow me to replace your chest with theirs and you will begin to grow a seed in the center of your body — it will take a month for it to be good for harvest. When planted, a tree spirit will be born; it will tend to the forests and adopt any abandoned children.
Each year, you grow a new seed. Each planted seed becomes a powerful tree spirit (dryad-class) loyal to you. After a decade, you command a small forest-court of dryads.

objects.title: Blackhole Chest
objects.text: I could put a black hole in ya. I'll of course rewrite a few laws of reality and make it where whenever it consumes something it goes poof and makes you stronger — permanently. +1% to all physical attributes per human-equivalent consumed, with no upper limit. you can open the black hole as a localized singularity — a 10-meter sphere of gravitational distortion that pulls in and destroys anything within range (you're immune)

objects.title: Dionysus' Liver
objects.text: Greek god of wine, madness, and rebirth. Your liver regenerates from any damage within minutes (yes, like Prometheus, but updated). You are immune to all toxins, poisons, and diseases. You can also consume any amount of alcohol (or any intoxicant) without harm, and your blood becomes a potent elixir — anyone who drinks it enters a divine frenzy (combat power doubled, fear immunity, mild madness); you can enter 'Bacchic Frenzy': tripled physical attributes, immunity to pain, and the ability to inspire frenzy in allies (10× their combat power, but they may not follow orders)

objects.title: Atlas' Shoulders
objects.text:
Greek Titan who holds up the sky. Your shoulders become capable of bearing ANY weight — you can lift anything that physically exists, no matter how heavy. Mountains, ocean liners, skyscrapers — if you can get a grip, you can lift it.
You also gain: infinite stamina, unbreakable bones, and the ability to anchor yourself to the ground (nothing can move you if you don't want to be moved)

objects.title: Buddha's Stomach
objects.text: The Belly of the Awakened One. Your stomach becomes a font of inner peace — you cannot be famished, you cannot be poisoned, and you can survive on sunlight alone if needed. More importantly, you radiate an aura of calm in a 30-meter radius: anger cools, fear fades, conflicts lose their urgency. you can enter 'Nirvana Pocket' — a state of perfect awareness where you can perceive all possible actions in your vicinity and their consequences, then choose the optimal one.

objects.title: Prometheus' Liver
objects.text:
Greek Titan who gave fire to humanity. Your liver regenerates endlessly — from any wound, any damage, in minutes. You cannot be killed by organ failure, blood loss, or any physical trauma short of complete bodily destruction (and even then, you regrow from a single cell over weeks).
You also gain the 'Fire of Forethought' — Prometheus' gift to humanity, refined. You can: produce and control fire at will, see one hour into the future (always accurate), and grant any single power you possess to a mortal (permanently — they keep it, you lose a fraction of it)

objects.title: Tiamat's Womb
objects.text:
Babylonian primordial mother of monsters. Your chest becomes a womb of creation —, you can birth a creature of your design. The creature can be anything: a loyal beast, a humanoid servant, a monstrous weapon. You decide its form, abilities, and disposition at birth (within power limits — no gods, but up to 'challenging monster' tier).
Your children are absolutely loyal to you. You can have up to twelve active at once; older ones must be released or killed to make room for new ones.

objects.title: Susanoo's Storm Body
objects.text: Japanese storm god. Your entire torso becomes a localized storm-system: your lungs contain perpetual wind, your heart beats with thunder, your blood is rain. You can: exhale hurricane-force winds, call down lightning from your heart at will (a dozen strikes, each destroying a vehicle), and summon a storm covering a square mile. you can manifest 'Susanoo-no-Mikoto Form' — a 30-foot giant of storm and bone, wielding the Totsuka sword, capable of leveling a town.

objects.title: Adamantine Frame
objects.text: Greek mythic metal — the same stuff that makes up Zeus's scepter and Achilles' armor. Your entire skeletal structure becomes adamantine. Your bones cannot be broken by any force short of divine weaponry. You're immune to blunt trauma (a falling building just bruises you), your strikes hit with adamantine force (you can punch through tank armor), and your body is weighty in a way that makes you hard to move. you can briefly 'solidify' —, your entire body becomes adamantine, granting invulnerability to anything short of god-forged weapons.

objects.title: Brahma's Navel
objects.text: Hindu creator-god. From your navel grows a lotus — a spiritual focus that connects you to the cosmic cycle of creation. You can: create small objects from nothing (up to a cubic meter of material ), animate non-living matter (statues, tools, weapons gain brief life), and 'recreate' any object you've destroyed within the last 24 hours. you can perform a 'Day of Brahma' —, anything you imagine into existence becomes real (within a 100-meter radius). After, the creations fade unless you sacrifice a piece of yourself to make them permanent.

objects.title: Sun Wukong's Iron Lung
objects.text: Journey to the West. Your lungs become iron gourds — capable of holding infinite breath, and you can exhale 'SAMADHI FIRE' that burns anything (even water, even stone, even conceptual things like curses). You're immune to all fire, smoke, and gas. you can exhale a '72 Transformations Breath' — temporarily transform into any of 72 different forms (animals, objects, other people). Each transformation lasts an hour.

objects.title: Ymir's Body
objects.text: Norse primordial giant. Your body becomes a microcosm of Ymir — the giant whose body became the world. Your blood is rivers (you can produce and control water within 100 meters), your bones are mountains (you can grow bone-armor plating), your hair is forests (you can grow prehensile hair that can stretch and grapple); you can 'My Body Is Not A Temple like Ymir' — willingly allow your body to be dismembered (it reforms over a week) in exchange for the dismembered parts becoming permanent features of the landscape (a finger becomes a tower, an eye becomes a lake, etc.). Each such sacrifice grants you a permanent power boost.

objects.title: Quetzalcoatl's Heart
objects.text: Aztec feathered-serpent god. Your chest houses the heart of Quetzalcoatl — a still-beating heart that grants you dominion over wind, sky, and learning. You can: fly (manifest spectral wings), command winds up to hurricane force, and learn any skill or knowledge simply by witnessing it once (perfect recall + instant mastery); you must perform a 'New Fire Ceremony' — a ritual where you sacrifice a fragment of your own heart (literally, you tear a piece off and burn it; it regrows over a month). If you fail to perform this, the world's fires begin to go out (matches won't strike, engines won't ignite, eventually even stars dim)

objects.title: Athena's Aegis
objects.text: Greek — your chest is graced with Athena's Aegis, the divine shield-breastplate. You gain: supernatural protection (the Aegis absorbs any attack — physical, magical, or conceptual — rendering you effectively invulnerable, and resistant the rest of the time), the gift of tactical genius (you instinctively know the best move in any conflict), and the ability to summon the 'Gorgon's Head' — a spectral Medusa head on your Aegis that petrifies anyone who meets its gaze.

objects.title: Hercules' Lion Pelt
objects.text: Greek — your torso is wrapped in the Nemean Lion's pelt. You gain: supernatural durability (the pelt is impenetrable to any weapon — swords, bullets, magic all bounce off), superhuman strength (10× human, in the Hercules tier), and the ability to perform 'Twelve Labors' — twelve great feats of strength that, once completed, grant you a permanent divine blessing (one blessing per Labor, your choice from a list).

objects.title: [META] Jinchūriki Seal
objects.text: A tailed beast (Bijuu) from the Naruto universe is sealed inside your body. Choose any of the nine canonical Bijuu (Shukaku, Matatabi, Isobu, Son Gokū, Kokuō, Saiken, Chōmei, Gyūki, Kurama) or create your own. The beast grants you: massive chakra reserves, the beast's signature element (sand for Shukaku, fire for Kurama, etc.), accelerated healing, and the ability to draw on the beast's power for a 10× boost. you can enter 'Version 2' — a chakra-cloak form that multiplies your power 100×. At full mastery, you can enter full Bijuu form (become the beast itself)

objects.title: [META] Spiral Core
objects.text: Your chest becomes a Spiral Power core — the cosmic energy of evolution and determination from Gurren Lagann. You can generate unlimited energy through pure willpower, manifest drills of green spiral energy that can pierce dimensions, and evolve any object you touch into a more advanced form (a rifle becomes a railgun, a car becomes a mech); you can enter 'Lagann Form' — your spiral power multiplies exponentially, allowing you to combine with other entities (your allies, your vehicles, even your enemies) into giant merged forms. At the peak, you can grow to the size of a galaxy (briefly)

objects.title: [META] Faerie Queen's Shadow
objects.text:
Your shadow is no longer a shadow — it is a prison for the dead. You have the ability to collect 'shades' of those dying or recently dead near you, through touch. This process is always fatal to the dying person (they die instantly when you claim their shade). You can call forth these shades and command them.
You have the ability to perceive the magical powers of others in the form of imagery that represents the powers in an abstract sense. You can collect the shades of anyone who dies within a certain range of yourself. The more powerful the magical powers, the more difficult it will be for you to claim, and the fewer shades you can have summoned at a time (you can hold up to 30 minor shades, 7 moderate, or 3 major at once). With practice, you can improve your ability at this.
Each shade you summon can use its powers in life at 50% strength, and follows your commands absolutely.

objects.title: [META] Entombed Skeleton of the Dragon of Mars
objects.text:
The capstone of the Machine God path. The Void Dragon — Mag'ladroth, the most powerful of the C'tan — is entombed within your skeleton. Not a shard, but the Dragon itself, compressed into Necrodermis bones that now form your frame.

Through it, you hear its beating whispers of wondrous technology — all technology, no matter how advanced or primitive, yields to you. Within your subconscious now exists a complete STC archive containing: the entirety of War in Heaven Necron technology (world engines, Celestial Orrery, aeon-staves, tesseract Vaults, the Necron Crown of Command), the complete Dark Age of Technology human archive (iron men, STC constructors, men of gold, warp-drives, anti-grav plates, sun-snuffers), AND the Void Dragon's own cosmic engineering knowledge (how to build and unmake stars, shape dimensions, weave physical laws).

You can command any technology by touch — even machines 'incapable' of obedience respond to you. You can mentally fabricate any technology you have the knowledge for, given time and raw materials. Your C'tan Shard Form now manifests as the Void Dragon itself — a 100-foot serpent of living metal and starfire, capable of devouring worlds.

The Adeptus Mechanicus Noosphere opens fully to you — you perceive the entire network of human technology as a glowing web of data that you can shape at will.

objects.title: [META] Rune Armor Body
objects.text:
Your torso is encased in a living suit of Eldar Rune Armor — psychically-reactive wraithbone plates inscribed with protective runes. The armor is part of you, growing from your skin, responding to your thoughts.
You gain: extreme physical protection (the armor absorbs impacts that would level buildings, regenerates any damage over minutes), psychic amplification (your psychic powers are doubled while wearing the armor), and the ability to 'phase' through matter for short bursts (become intangible, — the armor shifts you slightly out of phase with reality).
The runes inscribed on the armor also grant passive protections: immunity to mind-control, resistance to curses, and the ability to see through illusions.
Requires: Bonesinger's Hands.

objects.title: [META] Haki Body (One Piece)
objects.text: Your body becomes a master of Haki — the spiritual power of the One Piece world. You gain: Kenbunshoku Haki (observation — sense the presence, emotions, and intentions of everyone within a mile; see briefly into the future to dodge attacks), Busōshoku Haki (armament — coat your body in spiritual armor that hits elemental/intangible foes, boosts your strength 10×, and protects you from damage), and Haōshoku Haki (conqueror's — knock out weak-willed foes with your mere presence, dominate the wills of others, only 1 in a million have this).

objects.title: [META] Titan Shifter (AoT)
objects.text: Your body can transform into a Titan — a giant humanoid from Attack on Titan. You gain: the ability to transform into a 15-meter Titan at will (your human body fuses with the Titan form, you control it like your own body), superhuman regeneration (in Titan form, any wound closes in seconds), and the ability to inherit a Titan power of your choice from the Nine (Founding, Attack, Colossal, Armored, Female, Beast, Jaw, Cart, War Hammer). Each has unique abilities. Transformation is exhausting; you can only maintain Titan form at a time before needing rest.

objects.title: [META] Adamantine Ribcage (Naruto)
objects.text: Your ribcage becomes the focus for Susanoo — the manifested spirit-warrior of the Mangekyō Sharingan. You can: manifest skeletal arms and ribs of pure chakra that protect you from any attack (the ribcage alone can withstand artillery fire), extend spectral arms to attack at range, and — with mastery — manifest the full Susanoo (a 30-foot humanoid warrior of bone and chakra wielding divine weapons). The Susanoo can fly and is invulnerable to non-magical attacks.

objects.title: [META] Mastery of One For All (MHA)
objects.text: Your body becomes the vessel for One For All — the stockpiling quirk from My Hero Academia. You gain: superhuman strength (start at 5× human, grows with training and use), superhuman speed and durability, and the ability to project your power as concussive bursts (the Delaware Smash, Detroit Smash, etc.). As you master it, you also unlock the quirks of previous users (Blackwhip — energy tendrils; Float — flight; Danger Sense — precognition; Smokescreen — obscuring clouds; Fa Jin — energy stockpiling for bursts; Gearshift — inertia manipulation).

objects.title: [META] Magia Erebea Body (Negima)
objects.text: Your body becomes a vessel for Magia Erebea — the dark magic absorption technique from Negima/UQ Holder. You can: absorb any offensive magic cast at you and store it in your body (the magic charges you rather than harms you), then release it as a boosted counter-attack. Each absorbed spell permanently adds to your magical reservoir. With enough stored magic, you can enter 'Magia Erebea Form' — a dark-armored transformation that multiplies your physical and magical power 10×.

objects.title: [META] Restriction Order (JJK)
objects.text: Your body is bound by a Binding Vow from Jujutsu Kaisen — but in your favor. You impose a single restriction on yourself (a defined limitation: 'I cannot lie', 'I cannot use weapons', 'I must announce my attacks', etc.), and in exchange, your overall power is amplified 10×. The restriction is real and binding, but the power boost is enormous. You can change the restriction once per year.

objects.title: [META] Hollow Mask Body (Bleach)
objects.text: Your body can manifest a Hollow Mask from Bleach. When you don the mask (a mental command), you gain: 10× amplification of all your powers, a Hollow's spiritual pressure (crushes weak-willed foes), the ability to fire Cero blasts (energy beams from your mouth or hands), and high-speed regeneration. The mask can be worn indefinitely once mastered, but takes practice to control — initially it threatens to take over your personality.

objects.title: [META] Royal Knight Body (Digimon)
objects.text: Your body carries the data of a Royal Knight from Digimon — specifically, you can biomerge into a Royal Knight form (Omnimon, Gallantmon, Imperialdramon, etc.). In Royal Knight form: you become a 30-foot armored warrior with divine power, capable of devastating armies; you gain a signature attack of godlike power (Omnimon's All-Delete, Gallantmon's Shield of the Just, etc.); and your data is hardened against corruption.

objects.title: [META] Dead Apostle Body (Type-Moon)
objects.text: Your body becomes that of a Dead Apostle from Type-Moon — an enhanced undead. You gain: immortality (don't age, regenerate from any wound), supernatural physical abilities (10× human), the ability to convert others into your undead servants by feeding them your blood, the ability to control wildlife (especially rats, bats, and wolves), and a Reality Marble — a pocket dimension that overrides reality in a 100-meter radius with your chosen theme.

objects.title: [META] Conceptual Biology (Type-Moon)
objects.text: Your body becomes a Conceptual Being from Type-Moon — you exist as a concept as much as a physical form. You gain: the ability to define a 'concept' for yourself (e.g., 'the unkillable swordsman', 'the eternal wanderer', 'the inevitable death'), and reality bends to enforce that concept — if your concept is 'the unkillable swordsman', you cannot be killed while wielding a sword. Your concept also grants related powers.

objects.title: [META] A.T. Field Body (Evangelion)
objects.text: Your body generates an A.T. Field from Neon Genesis Evangelion — a barrier of the soul that manifests as a physical force. You can: project a hexagonal barrier that blocks any attack (physical, magical, conceptual — nothing gets through), expand the field to push away anything within 30 meters, and focus the field into offensive strikes (a wave of force that levels buildings). The A.T. Field is powered by your sense of self.

objects.title: [META] Spiral Energy Body (Gurren Lagann)
objects.text: Your body becomes a generator of Spiral Energy from Gurren Lagann — the cosmic energy of evolution and determination. You can: generate unlimited energy through willpower, manifest drills of green energy that pierce dimensions, evolve any object you touch into a more advanced form, and grow to giant size (up to 50 feet) by channeling Spiral Power. Your determination directly translates to power — the more passionate you are, the stronger you become.

objects.title: [META] Wizard Saint Body (Fairy Tail)
objects.text: Your body carries the magic of a Wizard Saint from Fairy Tail — one of the ten strongest mages on the continent. You gain: a massive magical reservoir (Ethernano in your body), the ability to learn and cast any Fairy Tail magic (Dragon Slayer, Celestial Spirit Magic, Requip, Memory-Make, etc.), and a signature magic of your design that you have absolute mastery over. Your magic grows with use.

objects.title: [META] Contractor Body (Darker than Black)
objects.text: Your body becomes a Contractor from Darker than Black. You gain: a single defined supernatural ability of your design (matter creation, gravity manipulation, time stop, electricity control, etc.), perfect rationality (emotions don't cloud your judgment), and the ability to pay a Remuneration (a small OCD behavior after each use — annoying but harmless). Your power is reliable and grows slightly with use.

objects.title: [META] Nen Body (Hunter x Hunter)
objects.text: Your body becomes a Nen master from Hunter x Hunter. You gain: the ability to project and shape your aura (Ten — defense, Ren — amplification, Hatsu — unique ability), a Nen type based on your personality (Enhancement, Emission, Transmutation, Conjuration, Manipulation, Specialization), and the ability to develop multiple Hatsu abilities with training. Nen also grants superhuman durability and perception. Your aura is visible to other Nen users.

rows.title: Body
rows.titleText:
Wellllll technically your stomach, back, chest, ribs, a few other things. and since you, probably, only got one body you only get one choice. If you do have an additional body attached to you, I'm just going to cut it off and give it the counterparts to the ones you've selected, which is a shame! A few would look good in my collection.

You will lose your sense of feeling in your chest if you select an option from here.

objects.title: Static Touch
objects.text:
Your head crackles with the first spark of storm-power. You can: generate static electricity at will (shock on touch, power small devices, ignite flammable materials), sense electrical fields within 30 meters, and resist minor electrical shocks without harm.
This is the first step on the path of the Storm — the foundation upon which greater storm-power can be built.

objects.title: Lightning Caller
objects.text:
Your storm-power grows. You can now: call down lightning from the sky (one bolt per minute, strong enough to demolish a vehicle), generate and control electrical currents in your body (you can channel lightning through your strikes, power any device by touch, or run at superhuman speed by electrically stimulating your muscles), and perceive the world through electrical signatures (you can 'see' the electrical activity in others' bodies, revealing their emotions and intentions).
Requires: Static Touch.

objects.title: Storm Bringer
objects.text:
Your storm-power expands to encompass the weather itself. You can: summon localized storms (covering up to a square mile, with rain, wind, and lightning), control wind direction and intensity (up to 100 mph gusts), part clouds, and call or dismiss rain at will. Your lightning-calling power also intensifies — you can now call down a dozen bolts per minute, each capable of demolishing a building.
You also gain: the ability to fly by riding wind currents (up to 200 mph), immunity to all weather effects, and the power to bless or curse a region with good or bad weather for a season.
Requires: Lightning Caller.

addons.title: Patchwork Divine
addons.text: You will now be powered by worship. Each prayer strengthening your hold over the domains your new body holds within, but these prayers will shape you. Be careful about who you bring into your fold, lest something new pilots your body.

objects.title: Zue's Head
objects.text:
Wear this and you'll be king of thunder. What does that mean, you ask? It means you can call down lightning whenever ya wish to, call a storm over an entire city, and become not only immune to lightning but temporarily stronger when struck by it. A single bolt can level a city block; a sustained storm can flatten a city over an hour.
You can also: fly by riding the wind, transform into an eagle at will, command any bird of prey, and project your voice as thunder (a shout can shatter windows for a mile). At full power, you can summon the 'Thunderbolt of Zeus' — a single planet-shaking strike.

objects.title: Hathor's title
objects.text:
Mother of the pharaohs, probably — I don't pay attention to your embarrassing politics. Not after I collected the fae parts. With this you can select any pharaoh to revive, and along with them all their subjects will follow; they will bow to you. But they shall no longer be humans, far too mundane. They will become mummies — un-aging undead that can survive any blow and can only be killed through complete disintegration. Their bodies will be restored to their peaks.
Each pharaoh brings 100-10,000 subjects depending on their historical empire. They are absolutely loyal to you as the new 'pharaoh of pharaohs'. You can also grant the mummy-curse to living subjects (transform them into mummy-servants)

objects.title: Dreadwolf's head
objects.text:
This one isn't from your multiverse, sort of. This elf 'god' wanted to destroy the world to bring back his lot of elves, or maybe he wanted to stop other elf gods from getting freed? Weird stuff with that universe's timeline going on, think the ending got rebooted a few times.
Anyways, what does it do, you ask? You get access to magic and a dream realm, recently made demon/elf free. Your magic will start out strong enough to level buildings, and eventually melting an entire army of ten thousand will be a parlor trick. You can enter the dream realm at will (your body sleeps), shape it to your will, and pull dream-creatures into reality.

objects.title: Yaldabaoth's Crown
objects.text:
The snake-lion that made a universe to torture you all, also made his way into existence without consent, I think? Look, it's hard to keep track of universes that split off from yours — there are always so many maybe/probably/most likely, causing far too many to exist!
What does it do? You shall take in every sin you commit, drinking in the essence of evil, making you stronger the more heinous the sin is. A petty theft makes you slightly stronger; a murder doubles your power; an atrocity makes you a god among mortals. The power boost is permanent.

objects.title: Gaia's Head
objects.text:
Custom-made one for her. With this, animals will bow before you, and if you wished to you could turn them into 'monsters' — increasing their size and strength, adding new heads/limbs to them, or giving them the ability to breathe fire. If you took a wolf you could make it up to the size of a bear, add two more pairs of legs, or give it the ability to breathe whatever element you'd like.
You can also command plants within a mile, communicate with any animal, and sense the health of the land itself. you can awaken a region's ecosystem to sentience — the plants and animals of a 10-mile radius become a coordinated intelligence loyal to you.
Oh blessed ruler of the animal kingdom, do you know the story of the sky and earth? I hope so. Anyways, I will grant Uranus his last wish and give you your opposite — kind of. The 'opposite' will have the power to animate lifeless rocks and be able to make monsters from them that will be five times as strong as yours. Oh, and before you get any ideas of befriending them, I allowed Uranus to pick out a specific someone who'd never bow before you.

addons.title: New Overlord
addons.text: I'll throw Gnarl in as a bonus to your dedication to being the overlord, or are you trying to be overlad? Anyways, gnarl is a powerful and wise sorcerer, who happens to be a minion. He will be (mostly) loyal to you and will lead your minions in your absence. While it is normally a terrible idea to allow minions to lead themselves Gnarl is actually smart and possesses common sense.

objects.title: Overlord's Helm
objects.text:
Yea, same Overlord if you really needed the confirmation. With this the green minions will join your army — they are sneaky, pack a good punch, can't take a good punch, and they also stink. You also get a spawning pit for these ones.
Green minions excel at assassination, poison-craft, and stealth. Up to 50 at a time. you can summon a 'Gnarl's Strategy' — a perfect tactical plan for any military engagement appears in your mind.

objects.title: No Head
objects.text: Do you even need a head? I could just chop it off and let ya place other people's heads in its place. Why would you want to wear other people's heads? Well, you'd gain their powers and memories, obviously. you can decapitate a recently-dead (within 24 hours) human and wear their head, gaining their skills, memories, and one of their supernatural powers (if any). You can swap heads at will.

objects.title: Dracula's head
objects.text: Now. we already had a vampire option. Yea, we're just gonna do that again, but this time I'll grant you the ability to sire other vampires (each bound to you as a fledgling), allow you out in the sun (no sun weakness), and grant you the powers of Dracula at his peak: command wolves and rats, transform into mist/bat/wolf, scale walls like a spider, hypnotic gaze, control weather, and limited immortality (cannot die of age or disease)

objects.title: Metsavana's head
objects.text: Father of the forests (Estonian myth). You hear all who say your name, and can choose to appear before them. You can also: command all forest creatures within ten miles, cause trees to grow or wither at will, and travel between any two forests in the world by stepping into one and out of another. you can call the 'Wild Hunt' — a spectral hunting party of forest spirits that rides across the land, hunting whoever you designate. They cannot be stopped by mortal means.

objects.title: Head of Justice
objects.text:
He had a small stint as a terrorist, but I think I grabbed the head before he became one. He will make all of your abilities slightly stronger (+20% across the board), or give you more people (a small army of fanatically loyal followers appears at your side — about 100 people).
You also gain: a perfect sense of justice (you can sense the 'weight' of a sin by looking at someone), the ability to forge binding magical contracts (breaking one curses the breaker), and a aura of authority that makes weak-willed people obey you.

objects.title: Odin's Head
objects.text:
Norse All-Father. Your head carries Odin's wisdom — sacrifice-made-flesh. You gain: perfect memory, the ability to see the future in broad strokes (a single clear image, never false), mastery of runes (you can carve runes that produce magical effects — protection, death, wealth, etc.), and the ability to speak with the dead.
Two spectral ravens (Huginn and Muninn — Thought and Memory) perch on your shoulders; they fly anywhere in the world at your command and report back what they see. You see through their eyes when they fly.

objects.title: Thoth's Head
objects.text: Egyptian ibis-headed god of wisdom, writing, and magic. Your head takes on ibis aspects (you can shift between human and ibis-headed form). You gain: absolute mastery of all written knowledge (you can read any language, including dead and magical ones), the ability to write spells into existence (anything you write down with intent becomes magical — wishes, curses, blessings), and perfect recall of everything you've ever read. you can 'Write Reality' — by writing a single true sentence about the world, you can make it slightly more true (a fire burns hotter, a wall is slightly weaker, a person is slightly braver). The effect is subtle but cumulative.

objects.title: Anubis Head
objects.text: Egyptian jackal-headed god of death. Your head takes on jackal aspects (you can shift between human and jackal-headed form). You gain: the ability to see and speak with all dead souls (they're visible to you at all times), the power to weigh hearts (you can judge any soul, instantly knowing their virtue and sins), and the ability to guide souls to any afterlife you choose. you can 'Embalming Touch' — preserve any organic matter indefinitely (corpses become mummies that don't decay, food never spoils, etc.); you can raise a willing dead soul as a mummy-servant.

objects.title: Mimir's Head
objects.text: Norse — the decapitated head of Mimir, wisest of the Aesir, preserved and kept by Odin. Your head is now Mimir's — you gain: absolute knowledge of all Norse myths and runes, the ability to answer any question asked of you (your answer is always true, though often cryptic), and a perfect memory that extends back to before your birth. you can drink from Mimir's Well (a spiritual well you can access at will) — this grants you a single piece of cosmic knowledge, anything from 'the location of a lost artifact' to 'the true name of a god'. The knowledge always has a cost — you forget something of equal value.

objects.title: Brahma's Head
objects.text: Hindu creator-god with four faces (you can manifest up to four faces, each facing a different direction). You gain: perfect creativity (any art you make is masterwork), the ability to create new concepts (you can invent a new word, and people will understand what it means), and the power to manifest small objects from nothing (up to a cubic meter of material ); you can create a 'Brahma-Day' — a 24-hour period where your creative power is unlimited: anything you imagine becomes real within a 100-meter radius.

objects.title: Sun Wukong's Head
objects.text:
Journey to the West. Your head carries the Monkey King's essence — irreverent, cunning, and rebellious. You gain: 72 earthly transformations (you can transform into any of 72 different forms — animals, objects, people), cloud-somersault (a single leap covers 33,000 miles), and the ability to clone yourself by plucking hairs (each clone has 1/10 your power; up to 100 clones at once).
You also gain the 'Fiery Golden Gaze' — see through any deception, illusion, or transformation.

objects.title: Ra's Head
objects.text: Egyptian falcon-headed sun-god. Your head takes on falcon aspects (you can shift between human and falcon-headed form). You gain: control of sunlight (you can brighten, dim, or focus the sun's rays — focused enough to ignite stone from a mile away), the ability to fly (manifest spectral falcon wings), and the power to heal any wound by bathing it in sunlight. at dawn, you can renew yourself (heal all wounds, restore all powers) by greeting the rising sun. you can manifest 'Ra's Barque' — a flying solar ship that can carry you and allies through the sky (and the underworld).

objects.title: Quetzalcoatl's Head
objects.text: Aztec feathered-serpent god. Your head takes on serpentine aspects (you can shift between human and feathered-serpent-headed form). You gain: dominion over wind (summon winds up to hurricane force), the power of flight (manifest spectral wings), and the gift of knowledge (any skill you witness, you instantly learn); you can shed your skin — emerging renewed (healed of all wounds, restored to peak condition, cleansed of all curses); you can transform fully into Quetzalcoatl — a 100-foot feathered serpent capable of devastating a city.

objects.title: Amaterasu's Head
objects.text: Japanese sun-goddess. Your head radiates sunlight — a perpetual halo of warm light surrounds you. You gain: control of sunlight (you can brighten, dim, or focus it), the ability to banish any darkness (magical or mundane) within line of sight, and the power to grow plants at an accelerated rate (a seed becomes a tree in a day); you can manifest 'Ama-no-Iwato' — a sacred cave that hides you from the world for up to 24 hours. While hidden, you heal and recharge; the world outside experiences an eerie twilight.

objects.title: Hades' Head
objects.text:
Greek god of the underworld. Your head carries Hades' authority: you can see and command the dead (all undead within a mile obey you), sense the approach of death (you know when someone within your sight is going to die within a week), and open portals to the underworld at will.
You also gain the 'Helm of Hades' — when worn, you become completely imperceptible (no sight, sound, smell, or magical detection can reveal you). You can wear the Helm indefinitely.

objects.title: Kali's Head
objects.text: Hindu goddess of destruction and liberation. Your head carries Kali's fierce aspect. You gain: the power to destroy on touch (anything you touch with intent to destroy crumbles), the ability to perceive the sins of those you look upon, and the courage of the destroyer (you cannot feel fear); you can enter 'Mahakali Form' — a 15-foot-tall, four-armed, skull-adorned aspect that can destroy anything short of divine artifacts on touch.

objects.title: Cthulhu Head
objects.text: Eldritch. Your head carries a fragment of the dreaming god. You gain: telepathy (you can speak mind-to-mind with anyone within a mile, and read surface thoughts of weak-willed beings), madness-inducing aura (anyone who looks upon you too long begins to lose their grip on reality), and the ability to enter the dreams of anyone whose name you know. you can manifest 'R'lyeh Rising' — your body becomes a 30-foot-tall eldritch horror with tentacles, wings, and the power to drive an entire city mad.

objects.title: Tengu Mask Head
objects.text: Japanese — you wear a perpetual red tengu mask (long nose, fierce expression) that you cannot remove (it IS your face now). You gain: absolute mastery of any blade, the ability to fly (manifest spectral wings), and the power to summon localized storms. you can take off your mask (it floats beside you) and your power doubles. During this time, you can cut through anything physical with a sword stroke.

objects.title: Hel's Head
objects.text: Norse goddess of the underworld. Half your head appears alive and beautiful, half appears decayed and corpse-like (you can shift the balance, but never fully hide one side). You gain: the power to command the dead (all undead within a mile obey you), the ability to see the fate of any soul you look upon (heaven, hell, rebirth, or wandering), and the power to claim any dying person for your realm. you can 'Split Judgment' — separate a person into their living and dead halves. The living half continues normally; the dead half becomes your servant.

objects.title: Tezcatlipoca's Head
objects.text: Aztec smoking-mirror god, lord of fate and temptation. Your head carries Tezcatlipoca's essence. You gain: the power to see into anyone's heart (know their deepest desires and fears), the ability to grant any single wish, and the smoking mirror — a portal that shows you anything happening anywhere in the world. you can 'Tempt' — grant a person their heart's deepest desire in exchange for their soul. They become your eternal servant.

objects.title: Thor's Head
objects.text: Norse god of thunder. Your head carries Thor's aspect — the mighty thunderer. You gain: the ability to call down thunderclaps that stun everyone within 100 meters, summon lightning at will (bolts strong enough to demolish a vehicle, up to 20 ), and the power to summon Mjolnir — a divine warhammer that returns when thrown, controls lightning, and can only be wielded by the worthy. You're also supernaturally strong (10× human) and immune to all electrical and sonic damage.

objects.title: Loki's Head
objects.text: Norse god of mischief. Your head carries Loki's shape-shifting cunning. You gain: the ability to shapeshift into any living form (animal, person, hybrid — perfect disguise, including voice), illusion-casting (create perfect sensory illusions that fool all five senses), and the power of the Trickster's Tongue — your lies cannot be detected by any mundane or magical means. You also gain supernatural charisma; people instinctively like and trust you.

objects.title: Isis's Head
objects.text: Egyptian goddess of magic and motherhood. Your head carries Isis's arcane mastery. You gain: the ability to learn and cast any spell you witness (once witnessed, you can reproduce it at 80% strength), the power to weave new spells from pure magical theory, and the gift of healing magic (any wound or disease can be cured with a touch and a prayer to Isis). You also gain knowledge of all Egyptian hieroglyphic magic — rune-like carvings that produce magical effects.

objects.title: Set's Head
objects.text: Egyptian god of chaos, storms, and the desert. Your head carries Set's chaotic aspect. You gain: the power to summon sandstorms (covering a square mile, blinding and buffeting everything within), control over chaos magic (spells that disrupt order — dispel enchantments, shatter structures, induce confusion), and the ability to transform into the Set-Beast (a chimera of unknown animals, 8 feet tall, supernaturally strong and fast).

objects.title: Tsukuyomi's Head
objects.text: Japanese god of the moon. Your head carries Tsukuyomi's lunar aspect. You gain: the ability to control moonlight (brighten, dim, focus into cutting beams), the power to enter and manipulate dreams (you can visit anyone's dreams, alter them, or pull dream-creatures into reality), and the gift of lunar healing (you heal rapidly under moonlight, and can heal others by bathing them in moonlight). Your power waxes and wanes with the moon — strongest at full moon, weakest at new moon.

objects.title: Inari's Head
objects.text: Japanese kami of rice, foxes, and prosperity. Your head carries Inari's benevolent aspect. You gain: the ability to bless crops and lands (any field you bless yields 10× normal harvest, any business you bless prospers), the power to command foxes (all foxes within a mile obey you; kitsune — fox-spirits — will serve you as messengers), and the gift of prosperity — money and resources find their way to you. You can also manifest ethereal foxfire to light your way.

objects.title: Shiva's Head
objects.text: Hindu god of destruction and transformation. Your head carries Shiva's cosmic aspect. You gain: the power of destructive touch (anything you touch with intent to destroy crumbles — stone to sand, steel to rust, living things to ash), the third eye of Shiva (a vertical eye on your forehead that, when opened, fires a beam of pure destruction —, can level a city block), and the ability to enter 'Nataraja' form — the cosmic dancer, whose dance sustains and destroys the universe. In this form, you can rewrite small aspects of reality.

objects.title: Ganesha's Head
objects.text: Hindu god of wisdom and obstacle-removal. Your head takes on elephantine aspects. You gain: supreme wisdom (perfect memory, accelerated learning, ability to solve any problem with enough contemplation), the power to remove obstacles (any barrier — physical, magical, conceptual — can be dispelled by your touch and a prayer), and the gift of being unblockable (no force can stop you from going where you wish — doors open, walls part, spells falter).

objects.title: Lugh's Head
objects.text: Celtic god of light and many skills. Your head carries Lugh's mastery. You gain: the Samildánach — mastery of ALL skills. Any skill you attempt, you can perform at expert level (master level with a week of practice). You can fight with any weapon, craft any item, play any instrument, speak any language, and perform any art. You also gain the spear of Lugh (a divine weapon that never misses and always returns when thrown).

objects.title: Dagda's Head
objects.text: Celtic god of druidry and abundance. Your head carries Dagda's mastery of nature and magic. You gain: the power of druidic magic (control plants, animals, weather, and earth within a mile), the cauldron of the Dagda (a magical cauldron that provides unlimited food — no one near it ever goes hungry), and the club of the Dagda (one end kills with a touch, the other end resurrects the dead).

objects.title: Erlang Shen's Head
objects.text: Chinese warrior-god with the third eye. Your head carries Erlang Shen's celestial aspect. You gain: a vertical third eye that sees through ALL deception (illusions, disguises, lies, invisible foes — all revealed), supreme combat prowess (you fight at the level of a martial god, with any weapon or unarmed), and the ability to manifest a divine spear (a celestial weapon that can pierce anything physical or magical). You also gain a celestial hound companion — a divine beast that tracks any prey across dimensions.

objects.title: Nezha's Head
objects.text: Chinese warrior-god, the lotus prince. Your head carries Nezha's fierce youthful aspect. You gain: the Wind-Fire Wheels (you can fly at 300 mph, leaving trails of fire and wind), the Universe Ring (a divine ring that returns when thrown, strikes with the force of a meteor), and the Red Armillary Sash (a divine sash that can bind any creature, even dragons). You also gain the lotus-body — you cannot be permanently killed; if destroyed, you reform from a lotus flower within a week.

objects.title: [META] Geass of Absolute Obedience (Code Geass)
objects.text: Your right eye bears the Geass of Lelouch vi Britannia — the power to issue a single absolute command to anyone who makes eye contact with you. The command is followed perfectly, even if it requires the victim to die. The command can be complex ('serve me forever', 'forget the last hour', 'become my spy'). Each person can only be Geassed once. per target, you can use Geass. The Geass cannot be resisted by mortals; only immortals or other Geass users can resist.

objects.title: [META] Eternal Mangekyō Sharingan (Naruto)
objects.text:
Your eyes (both) bear the Eternal Mangekyō Sharingan — the ultimate form of the Uchiha eye. You gain: perfect motion-tracking (you can read lip movements, copy any jutsu or skill you witness once, predict opponent's movements before they make them), and three Mangekyō abilities of your choice (canonical examples: Tsukuyomi — instill a 72-hour illusion in 1 second of eye contact; Amaterasu — black fire that doesn't go out; Susanoo — manifest a giant spectral warrior; Kamui — teleport anything to a pocket dimension).
Once unlocked, you can use all three abilities. Susanoo can be manifested as a full-body spectral warrior up to 50 feet tall.

objects.title: [META] Stand Skull (Jojo)
objects.text:
Your head becomes a Stand focus — you can manifest a Stand, a psychic entity that fights on your behalf. The Stand has a unique power of your design (within bounds — examples: time-stop, reality-rejection, fire-manipulation, soul-extraction, conceptual healing). The Stand is invisible to non-Stand-users, can move up to 50 meters from you, and is as strong as you design (within reason — most Stands can demolish a building, top-tier Stands can affect time/space).
If your Stand is destroyed, you die (and vice versa). You can also perceive other Stands.

objects.title: [META] Byakugan (Naruto)
objects.text: Your eyes become the Byakugan — the all-seeing eye of the Hyūga clan. You gain: 360° vision, telescopic sight (see clearly up to 10 miles), the ability to see chakra/energy flows (and the tenketsu points where they can be blocked), and x-ray vision (you can see through solid objects within 50 meters). You can also use Gentle Fist — a martial art that lets you strike an opponent's energy points directly, disabling their powers.

objects.title: [META] Rinnegan (Naruto)
objects.text: Your eyes become the Rinnegan — the most powerful dōjutsu in the Naruto universe. You gain: the Six Paths technique (Deva — gravity control; Asura — cybernetic body augmentation; Human — soul extraction; Animal — summoning any creature; Preta — absorb any energy/jutsu; Naraka — resurrection of the recently dead), perfect mastery of all five elemental releases, and the ability to see chakra/energy flows. You also gain the Outer Path — control over life and death itself.

objects.title: [META] Thinker-Trump Brain (Worm)
objects.text: Your brain develops a dual-class parahuman power: Thinker + Trump. The Thinker aspect gives you a perception power of your design (probability sight, perfect tactical analysis, threat-sense, skill-copying, etc.). The Trump aspect lets you manipulate other powers — boost allies' powers, weaken foes', copy powers you witness, or nullify powers within your radius. Both powers grow with use, and your Rogue Shard (connected to no Entity, achieved Negentropy, lives in your Firmament, is friendly) actively helps you develop new applications.

objects.title: [META] Code Eye (DxD)
objects.text: Your eye(s) become a Sacred Gear of the DxD universe — specifically, a Code Eye. You gain: the ability to perceive and analyze any supernatural phenomenon (spells, blessings, curses, magical items — all laid bare to your sight), the power to 'decode' magical structures (dispel enchantments by understanding their structure, or replicate them with practice), and the ability to perceive the 'true name' of any entity you look upon (true names grant power over their bearer). The eye also grants perfect photographic memory.

objects.title: [META] Psychic Awakening (40K)
objects.text: Your brain awakens as a full psychic of the Warhammer 40K universe. You gain: access to all the psychic disciplines (Telepathy — read and control minds; Telekinesis — move objects with thought; Divination — see the future; Pyromancy — control fire; Biomancy — alter flesh; Geokinesis — control earth; Fulmination — control electricity; Librarius — specialized anti-daemon powers). Your power scales with training, from Alpha-level (city-affecting) at peak. The Astronomicon itself becomes faintly visible to you as a guiding light.

objects.title: [META] Sharingan Head (Naruto)
objects.text: Your head bears the Sharingan — the Uchiha eye from Naruto. Your eyes (both) become Sharingan: you can copy any jutsu or skill you witness, predict opponent movements before they make them, see chakra/energy flows, and cast basic genjutsu (illusions). With training, the Sharingan evolves into Mangekyō (granting unique abilities like Tsukuyomi, Amaterasu, Susanoo) and eventually Eternal Mangekyō (no blindness risk).

objects.title: [META] Geass Head (Code Geass)
objects.text: Your head bears a Geass sigil — the power of kings from Code Geass. Your Geass manifests as a single defined absolute power of your design (Absolute Obedience commands, mind-reading, memory alteration, precognition, etc.). When activated, your eye glows red and the power activates on anyone who meets your gaze (or other trigger). The Geass cannot be resisted by mortals. With mastery, you can control it.

objects.title: [META] Mystic Eyes Head (Type-Moon)
objects.text: Your head bears Mystic Eyes from Type-Moon — a single defined eye-power of your design. Examples: Mystic Eyes of Petrification (Medusa's eyes — turn what you look at to stone), Mystic Eyes of Distortion (alter the 'concept' of objects you look at), Mystic Eyes of Charm (anyone who meets your gaze falls in love with you), Mystic Eyes of Death Perception (see the lines of death on everything). The eyes are always active.

objects.title: [META] Mind's Eye Head (Fate)
objects.text: Your head bears the Mind's Eye (True) from Fate — the supreme tactical perception. You gain: perfect analysis of any combat situation (you instinctively know the optimal move, your opponent's weaknesses, and the probability of success for any action), the ability to process information at superhuman speed, perfect memory, and a sixth sense for danger. You cannot be ambushed or outmaneuvered.

objects.title: [META] Cerebro Head (Marvel)
objects.text: Your head becomes a living Cerebro from Marvel Comics — a telepathic amplifier. You gain: telepathy (read surface thoughts of anyone within a mile, communicate mentally across any distance), the ability to detect mutants/supernaturals across the planet, mind control (dominate weak-willed targets), and the ability to project mental illusions. Your telepathy grows stronger with practice.

objects.title: [META] Anti-Spiran Head (Gurren Lagann)
objects.text: Your head carries Anti-Spiral genetics from Gurren Lagann. You gain: the ability to perceive and manipulate Spiral Energy (the cosmic force of evolution), the power to create 'Spiral Power dampeners' (suppress the powers of Spiral beings), probability manipulation (alter the likelihood of events), and the ability to enter a Multi-Dimensional Labyrinth state where you perceive all possible timelines simultaneously.

objects.title: [META] Cosmic Head (DC)
objects.text: Your head carries a fragment of the Source — the cosmic power from DC Comics. You gain: cosmic awareness (perceive events across the universe), the ability to channel the Omega Effect (fire beams from your eyes that erase anything they hit from existence), telepathy and telekinesis on a planetary scale, and the ability to perceive the Life Equation — the mathematical truth that defines existence.

objects.title: [META] Stand User Head (Jojo)
objects.text: Your head is the focus for a Stand from Jojo's Bizarre Adventure. You can manifest a Stand — a psychic entity that fights on your behalf. The Stand has a unique power of your design (time manipulation, reality warping, elemental control, etc.), is invisible to non-Stand users, can move up to 10 meters from you, and is as strong as you design. If your Stand is destroyed, you die (and vice versa).

objects.title: [META] Synth-Brain (Cyberpunk)
objects.text: Your brain is replaced with a Synth-Brain from Cyberpunk — a fully cybernetic brain. You gain: 100× processing speed (think faster than any human), perfect memory (record and recall everything), the ability to interface directly with any computer via touch, immunity to mind-altering effects (your brain is hardware, not wetware), and the ability to run software (combat programs, language packs, skill modules — instant mastery of any skill you install).

objects.title: [META] Buddha's Enlightenment Head (Record of Ragnarok)
objects.text: Your head carries the enlightened state of Buddha from Record of Ragnarok. You gain: the ability to perceive the 'wheel of fate' (see all possible futures and choose which one manifests), perfect equanimity (immune to fear, anger, despair — you remain calm in any situation), the ability to project a 'Pure Land' — a pocket dimension where you are absolute, and the Six Paths of Reincarnation — you can cycle through six different combat forms, each with unique abilities.

objects.title: [META] Combat Genius Head (HxH)
objects.text: Your head carries Netero's combat genius from Hunter x Hunter. You gain: perfect martial arts mastery (any style, learned instantly), the ability to enter a 'Zone' state (100× physical abilities, perfect focus, time appears to slow), and the Hyakushiki Kannon — you can manifest a 100-armed Buddha construct (50 feet tall) that attacks at the speed of sound, with each palm-strike carrying the force of a meteor.

rows.title: Head
rows.titleText: You. probably? only have one head, so pick at most one — unless you've taken the Transient Doppelganger Soul, in which case phase between as many as you like.

objects.title: Blood Red Eyes
objects.text:
Ripped these out of a particularly entertaining devil. You'll be able to control any blood within your sight, able to make it fly around at one hundred miles an hour, rip it out of bodies (with effort — strong-willed targets can resist for a few seconds), or crystallize it into solid weapons.
You can also: clot wounds (yours or others') with a glance, sense the blood type and health of anyone you look at, and trace anyone whose blood you've tasted to anywhere in the world.

objects.title: Lucifer's Gaze
objects.text:
Are some of these parts from your universe? What an odd question. With this you can see the demons that fled a dying afterlife. Few are left and none can affect the physical realm, just a lot of spectators. But with these eyes, when one catches your sight you can choose to bring them into true reality. Many will be grateful, but remember few saints become devils.
Each demon you materialize becomes bound to you for a year and a day — they must obey your commands (within their nature) and cannot harm you. After, they're free.

objects.title: Medusa's eyes
objects.text:
The classic magical eyes! For your universe, others have far more interesting classics. Any who makes eye contact with you will turn to stone — fully and permanently, down to the cellular level. The stone is high-quality marble; you can sell it.
You can selectively petrify (limbs, half-body, full) by will. you can UN-petrify a statue (any statue, not just ones you created) into living flesh.

objects.title: Gamer's Hud
objects.text:
You will see the world through the eyes of a player! You will know exactly where you stand in the world, see people's 'health bars', see their level, their stats, their class (if any), their weaknesses, and their inventory. You also see a minimap in the corner of your vision (with moving dots for all entities within a mile), quest markers above people's heads (telling you what they want most), and a level-up system for YOURSELF (gain XP from any challenging activity, level up to gain stat points and skill points).
You can also: open a 'skill tree' to learn new skills (with XP), craft items from recipes you discover, and access an inventory dimension (carry up to 100 items weightlessly)

objects.title: Star Eyes
objects.text:
Your eyes will look like the stars themselves — not the boring round kind. Tiny constellations drift across your irises, and when you focus, you can see the actual stars through any obstruction (walls, ceilings, daylight, planets, anything).
More importantly, by gazing at a specific constellation, you can draw down its power: Orion grants supernatural hunting prowess (never miss a shot, track any prey across dimensions); Ursa Major grants bear-like strength and durability; Draco grants a breath weapon; Cassiopeia grants prophetic visions; the Pleiades grant brief immortality (immune to all damage ). Each constellation has a different power, and there are 88 official constellations.
You can also: see in absolute darkness, navigate by the stars from anywhere (you always know true north and your exact coordinates), and, you can wish upon a star — the wish is granted, but the star goes out (permanently — there are limited stars, so choose carefully)

objects.title: Eyes of Odin
objects.text:
Norse All-Father's sacrifice. One of your eyes becomes silver-white (the other remains normal). With this eye, you can: see and understand ALL magic and supernatural phenomena you witness — spells, enchantments, curses, blessings, ghostly auras, divine marks, anything. You instantly know what it is, how it works, and (roughly) how to replicate or counter it.
You can also: see through any illusion (mundane or magical), perceive the true form of shapeshifters, and see the supernatural 'threads' connecting people to fate.

objects.title: Balor's Eye
objects.text:
Celtic Fomorian king's deadly eye. One of your eyes becomes huge and perpetually closed (the eyelid takes four strong men to lift, in myth). When you open it (with effort — it takes one full round of action), everything in your line of sight is annihilated: living things wither and die, stone crumbles, water boils away, enchantments shatter.
The destruction is total in a 100-meter cone. You can close the eye again with effort.

objects.title: Eyes of the Fates
objects.text: Greek Moirai — Clotho, Lachesis, Atropos. Your eyes can see the threads of fate that bind every living thing. You see: when someone was born (their thread's start), how long their thread is (rough estimate of remaining life), what other threads they're entwined with (relationships, enemies, destined encounters), and where their thread will be cut (their death, in broad strokes); you can 'snip' a thread — sever someone's fate-connection to a specific outcome (a destined marriage, an inevitable death, a cursed encounter). This doesn't change their thread, just the specific event.

objects.title: Dragon Eyes
objects.text: True sight of wyrms. Your eyes become reptilian slit-pupils with vertical irises. You gain: true sight (you see through ALL illusions and deceptions, magical or mundane), the ability to perceive the 'essence' of any object or creature (you know its true nature, history, and weaknesses), and a breath-weapon sense (you can see the channels through which breath weapons, magic, and energy attacks flow, letting you dodge them with supernatural ease); you can 'Dragon Gaze' — paralyze any single target you make eye contact with. They're frozen, fully aware but unable to move.

objects.title: Eye of Horus
objects.text: Egyptian — the eye of the falcon god, symbol of protection and healing. One of your eyes becomes the Wadjet (the Eye of Horus marking). You gain: the ability to heal any wound by gazing at it (a steady stream of healing energy flows from your eye to the target), the power to see sickness and poison (they appear as dark clouds in the body), and the ability to project a protective aura over anyone you can see (they gain resistance to harm while you watch them); you can 'Wadjet Beam' — fire a concentrated beam of pure healing energy that can also destroy undead and evil spirits.

objects.title: Eyes of Truth
objects.text: Your eyes become solid white — no pupils, no irises. You can see the TRUTH in all things: lies appear as black smoke around the liar's mouth, secrets appear as wrapped packages around the keeper's chest, hidden things glow faintly in your sight, disguises melt away to show the true form beneath. you can speak a 'Truth' — declare something to be true, and if it is true, reality reinforces it (a true statement like 'this wall is weak' makes the wall easier to break; 'this person is innocent' makes others more likely to believe them). You cannot declare falsehoods.

objects.title: Reaper Eyes
objects.text: Your eyes become hollow voids — black pits with faint white points of light deep within (like stars in the night sky). You can see death: people who will die soon glow with a death-shroud (white = within a year, grey = within a month, black = within a day), and you can see the method of their death (a knife-shadow, a car-shadow, etc.); you can 'Mark for Death' — designate a target. They will die within 24 hours, by whatever means the universe arranges. There is no save, no escape — only direct divine intervention can save them.

objects.title: Mosaic Eyes
objects.text:
Devilman-style. Your eyes become compound — like a fly's, but human-sized. You can see in every direction at once (360° vision), process visual information at super speed, and most importantly: copy any power you witness by watching it being used for 10 seconds. The copy is permanent but at 50% of the original's strength.
You can hold up to seven copied powers at once; learning a new one replaces the oldest. You also gain instinctive understanding of how to use any copied power.

objects.title: Geass Eyes
objects.text: Code Geass-style. One of your eyes (your choice) bears a glowing red sigil that activates when you use the power. You gain the power of ABSOLUTE COMMAND: anyone who makes eye contact with you while you activate Geass must obey a single command you give them. The command is followed perfectly, even if it requires the victim to die. The command can be complex ('serve me forever', 'forget the last hour', 'become my spy'). Each person can only be Geassed once. per target. The Geass cannot be resisted by mortals; only immortals or other Geass users can resist.

objects.title: Eagle Eyes
objects.text:
Your eyes become golden and sharp — like an eagle's. You gain: telescopic vision (you can see clearly up to 10 miles away), perfect aim (any ranged attack you make hits exactly where you aim, no matter the distance), the ability to see in slow motion (you can switch to a perception where everything moves at 1/10 speed, ), and the ability to track any moving object perfectly (no target can lose you once you've locked on).
You can also see through most forms of concealment (smoke, fog, foliage) as if they weren't there.

objects.title: Eyes of Eternity
objects.text: Your eyes become deep pools of swirling color — galaxies within your irises. You can see: the past (an object's history plays out before you when you focus on it), the present (you can see distant locations as if you were there, by focusing on a place you've been), and the future (a single second of foresight at all times, expandable to ten seconds with concentration); you can 'Chronos View' — see one hour into the future of any location you choose. you can see one year into the future.

objects.title: Sage Mode Eyes
objects.text: Naruto-style. Your eyes develop orange pigmentation around them (like a Sage Mode user). You gain: ability to sense all living things within a mile (you perceive them as glowing auras even through walls), the power to see 'nature energy' flows (the ambient magical energy in any environment), and danger-sense (you know when you're about to be attacked, and from which direction, half a second before it happens); you can enter 'Frog Kata' state — your strikes gain an invisible extension (you can hit targets a foot beyond your reach) and your physical attributes triple.

objects.title: Eye of Ra
objects.text: Egyptian — the solar eye of Ra, fiercer than Horus's. One of your eyes becomes a burning sun-disc. You gain: the ability to fire concentrated solar beams (hot enough to melt steel, with a range of 100 meters), the power to summon the 'Daughters of Ra' — fiery serpent-spirits that destroy your enemies, and immunity to all fire and light. You also see through darkness as if it were daylight.

objects.title: Heimdall's Eyes
objects.text: Norse — the eyes of the watchman of the gods. You gain: the ability to see anything happening anywhere in the world (focus on a location you've been to, see it in real-time), hear any sound within a thousand miles (you can filter what you hear), and need no sleep (your senses never tire). You can also see the approach of any threat hours before it arrives — a supernatural early-warning system.

objects.title: Freyja's Eyes
objects.text: Norse — the eyes of the goddess of love, war, and seiðr (magic). You gain: the ability to see the threads of fate connecting people (who will fall in love, who will fight, who will die), the power to inspire love or rage in anyone who meets your gaze (no save for mortals), and the gift of seiðr — Norse shamanic magic (you can cast divinations, shape-shift, and weave curses).

objects.title: [META] Contessa's Path to Victory (Worm)
objects.text:
Close your eyes — while others may only see darkness, you instead see too many things blur by. By focusing on your desire, these blurry, hazy sights sharpen to show you the calculations of future timelines of how you could achieve it. The Path always shows you the exact steps to achieve any goal you can articulate, no matter how impossible — including defeating entities far beyond your power level.
Even when your eyes are open, you have a sixth sense that always gives you the subconscious path to victory. You instinctively know the optimal action in any situation.

objects.title: [META] Mystic Eyes of Death Perception (Tsukihime)
objects.text:
Tsukihime-style. Your eyes perceive the 'death' of all things — the lines along which anything can be cut, and the points where a single strike causes true death. The lines cover everything: objects, living beings, concepts, even spells. Tracing a line with a cutting instrument severs it cleanly (cutting a wall's line makes it crumble; cutting a person's line kills them instantly; cutting a spell's line dispels it).
Stabbing a 'point' causes true death — the thing ceases to exist completely. Points are harder to see than lines (require intense focus) and exist on all things.

objects.title: [META] Tenseigan (Hamura's Eye)
objects.text: Your eyes become the Tenseigan — the evolved Byakugan of Hamura Ōtsutsuki's lineage. You gain: 360° vision, telescopic sight (see clearly up to 10 miles), the ability to see chakra/energy flows (and the tenketsu points where they can be blocked), and the power to enter 'Tenseigan Mode' — a glowing blue chakra mode that grants flight, gravity manipulation (you can push, pull, or crush with gravity within a 100-meter radius), and truth-seeking orbs (spheres of annihilation that erase what they touch); you can manifest a 'Tenseigan Chakra Mode' — all physical attributes 10×, flight, and five truth-seeking orbs (each can destroy a building)

objects.title: [META] Byakugan Eye (Naruto)
objects.text: Single-eye variant of the Byakugan. One of your eyes becomes a Byakugan, granting: 359° vision, telescopic sight up to 5 miles, ability to see energy flows and tenketsu points, and x-ray vision within 30 meters. You can use Gentle Fist with one hand, disabling opponents' energy points with precision strikes.

objects.title: [META] Triforce Sight (Zelda)
objects.text: Your eyes bear the mark of the Triforce — the golden triangle of Power, Wisdom, and Courage from The Legend of Zelda. You gain: Triforce of Power (your physical abilities are boosted 10×), Triforce of Wisdom (perfect memory, instant understanding of any magic you witness), and Triforce of Courage (immunity to fear, supernatural luck in danger). The full Triforce in your eyes also grants the ability to perceive the sacred and profane — you see divine blessings, curses, and the true nature of magical beings.

objects.title: [META] Mystic Eyes of Distortion (Nasuverse)
objects.text: Your eyes become Mystic Eyes of Distortion — a Noble Color mystic eye from the Nasuverse. You can perceive the 'concept' of any object or being you look at (its purpose, history, weaknesses, true nature), and you can subtly distort those concepts — make a sturdy wall conceptually fragile, make a slow person conceptually fast, make a hostile being conceptually docile. The distortion is gradual but persistent, and stacks over time.

objects.title: [META] Reality Marble Eyes (Type-Moon)
objects.text: Your eyes can project a Reality Marble from Type-Moon — a pocket dimension that overrides reality in a 100-meter radius. By focusing your gaze, you can manifest your Reality Marble: the environment transforms to match your inner world (a field of swords, a desert of bones, a frozen wasteland — your choice), and within the Marble, your chosen rule is absolute (e.g., 'all weapons within this space are mine to command', 'time does not flow within this space').

objects.title: [META] Mystic Eyes of Petrification (Type-Moon)
objects.text: Your eyes become Mystic Eyes of Petrification — Medusa's eyes from Type-Moon. Anyone who meets your gaze begins to turn to stone (the transformation starts at the extremities and moves inward; weak-willed targets petrify instantly, strong targets can resist for minutes). You can petrify selectively. The stone is high-quality marble and can be reversed by your will.

objects.title: [META] Star Platinum Eyes (Jojo)
objects.text: Your eyes become the focus for Star Platinum — Jotaro's Stand from Jojo. You can: see Stands and other invisible entities, perceive time at 1/10 speed (everything appears to move in slow motion), throw punches with perfect precision through your Stand (manifested from your gaze), and stop time for up to 5 seconds (during which only you can move). Your Stand is humanoid, incredibly fast and strong.

objects.title: [META] Byakugan Eyes (Naruto)
objects.text: Your eyes become the Byakugan — the Hyūga clan's eye from Naruto. You gain: 360° vision (one tiny blind spot at the back of the neck), telescopic sight (see clearly up to 10 miles), x-ray vision (see through solid objects within 50 meters), the ability to see chakra/energy flows and tenketsu points (allowing Gentle Fist strikes to disable opponents' powers), and the ability to perceive genjutsu/illusions.

objects.title: [META] Magic Eye (D&D)
objects.text: Your eyes become a True Seeing focus from Dungeons & Dragons. You can: see through ALL illusions and deceptions (magical or mundane), perceive the true form of shapeshifters, see invisible entities, see through magical darkness, perceive secret doors and hidden mechanisms, and see the alignment (good/evil) of any being you look at. Your sight cannot be fooled by any means.

objects.title: [META] Time-Sight (Steins;Gate)
objects.text: Your eyes can perceive time differently — Reading Steiner from Steins;Gate. You gain: the ability to perceive timeline shifts (you remember previous timelines even when reality changes around you), see 10 seconds into the future (always accurate), perceive 'time-loops' (you remember loops even when others don't), and the ability to send your consciousness back in time (once per month, you can 'load' a previous save point, retaining all current memories).

objects.title: [META] Emperor Eye (Kuroko no Basket)
objects.text: Your eyes become the Emperor Eye from Kuroko no Basketball. You can: perceive the future movements of anyone you look at (you see their next action a second before they make it — perfect for combat), predict the trajectory of any projectile, see the 'weakness' in any opponent's form or stance, and the ability to enter 'the Zone' (100× physical abilities, perfect focus). Your predictive ability works on any being.

objects.title: [META] Haki Eyes (One Piece)
objects.text: Your eyes become a master of Kenbunshoku Haki (Observation Haki) from One Piece. You gain: the ability to sense the presence, emotions, and intentions of everyone within a mile (even through walls), see briefly into the future (2-3 seconds — enough to dodge any attack), perceive the 'color' of people's aura (revealing their nature and power level), and the ability to predict opponent's moves before they make them.

objects.title: [META] Eye of the Moon (Naruto)
objects.text: Your eyes bear the Rinne-Sharingan — the eye of the Ten-Tails from Naruto. You gain: the powers of both the Rinnegan (Six Paths techniques) and the Sharingan (copying, prediction, genjutsu), the ability to cast the Infinite Tsukuyomi — a planetary illusion that traps everyone who sees the moon in a dream world (once per year), and the ability to open interdimensional portals.

objects.title: [META] Spiral Eyes (Gurren Lagann)
objects.text: Your eyes become Spiral-perceiving eyes from Gurren Lagann. You can: perceive Spiral Energy (see the determination and potential of any being), see through probability manipulation, perceive alternate timelines and possibilities, and the ability to 'force evolution' — anything you focus on with intent evolves into a more advanced form.

rows.title: Eyes
rows.titleText:
