You know what? Enough of the probablys, I'm just snapping my fingers and ensuring you have the average. This part will be different from the others: you can choose to either sacrifice that eye's sight, or to take the drawback/con/downside. If you do sacrifice your eye's eyesight then if any powers require seeing something, you will still be able- I'll skip the explanation and just give an example. You pick Medusa's eye and your empty sockets are staring right at someone, and would be making eye contact? Your power would activate.

Pick as many as you like (the Transient Doppelganger Soul lets you phase between eye-sets).

objects.title: Same Heart
objects.text:
I'll grow your heart into its own person, its own you. It will be exactly like you, besides the few differences in flavor I add. If you were polite, I would make it crass; if slothful, I will make it most energetic — but morality stays about the same.
Your heart-self is a loyal companion, fully sapient, who can act independently of you (it can go do things while you do other things). It has all your powers at 80% strength, and can share sensory information with you telepathically. If it dies, you lose 20% of your powers permanently and the heart regrows in your chest over a month.

objects.title: Blood Cells
objects.text:
You shall no longer produce blood (don't worry, I'll make sure you continue to look blood-filled). Whenever your blood drips out of your body it will become a new entity, harnessing one of the powers you've received from your sacrifices. Each drop of blood gives them 5% of the sacrifice's power. They will see you as an adored parent.
You can have up to 100 blood-children active at once. Each lives before dissolving back into raw blood (which you can re-absorb to heal). You can also voluntarily create blood-children by cutting yourself.

objects.title: Daemon Heart
objects.text:
Your heart is replaced with a Daemon Heart — a writhing mass of dark crimson muscle that absorbs the negative emotions and sins from those around you, condensing them into a pool of Primordial Malice that resides within you. This pool is an extremely potent source of power.
You can draw on the Primordial Malice to: heal yourself rapidly (it knits flesh with dark energy), cast dark-magic spells (any magic you know becomes twisted into a darker, more powerful version when fueled by Malice), shapeshift into monstrosities (each form unique to you, drawn from your sins), or drop it into your surroundings to corrupt them (plants wither, water poisons, stone cracks, the weak-willed are driven mad)

objects.title: Heart of the Phoenix
objects.text:
Greek mythic fire-bird. Your heart becomes a small, perpetually burning flame. You gain: immunity to fire, the ability to heal from any wound by immolating yourself in a burst of phoenix fire (1/day — full heal, but you're left exhausted), and a periodic 'rebirth' — every year on the anniversary of receiving this heart, you die and are reborn from your own ashes at age 25, in perfect health, with all memories intact.
Each rebirth makes you slightly stronger (+5% to all attributes, permanent). You can also grant a 'phoenix feather' to an ally — once, when they would die, they immolate and rebirth instead (consumes the feather)

objects.title: Heart of Stone
objects.text:
Your heart becomes literal stone — grey, cold, unmoving. You become immune to all emotional influence (fear, rage, despair, supernatural charm, etc.), gain +50% resistance to physical damage, and your will becomes indomitable — no force, magical or mundane, can break your resolve.
You can also: enter 'Statue State' for up to an hour (you become stone, fully invulnerable, but cannot move), and your presence dampens emotions in those around you (their strong feelings fade after a few minutes near you)

objects.title: Heart of the Saint
objects.text: Your heart becomes a holy relic — it glows with soft golden light visible through your skin. You gain: the power to heal any wound by touch (regenerate lost limbs over hours, cure any disease, purge any toxin), bless weapons to harm the supernatural, and create holy ground (a 50-meter radius around you becomes consecrated, harming undead and demons who enter); you can perform a true miracle: raise the recently dead (within 24 hours), cure any ailment no matter how supernatural, or banish any entity back to its home realm.

objects.title: Heart of the Heretic
objects.text: W40K-style. Your heart becomes a beacon of psychic potential — it pulses with the energy of the Warp. You gain: psychic powers (you can manifest any of the W40K psychic disciplines — telepathy, telekinesis, pyromancy, divination, biomancy, etc.), a passive 'soul-blaze' that harms daemons near you, and the ability to draw on the Warp for power (boosting any ability you possess); you can manifest a 'Nova' — a psychic explosion that affects all enemies within 50 meters with one of your disciplines.

objects.title: Clockwork Heart
objects.text:
Your heart becomes aprecision clockwork mechanism — brass gears, tiny springs, all in constant motion. You gain: infinite stamina (you cannot tire, ever), immunity to all poisons and diseases (your blood is filtered through tiny mechanisms), and the ability to 'overclock' your body for short bursts (10× speed, strength, and reflexes, with a one-hour cooldown).
You can also: stop your heart at will (feign death perfectly, for any duration), and see the 'mechanism' of any object you touch (you understand its function and how to repair it instantly)

objects.title: Twin Hearts
objects.text:
You grow a second heart, identical to your first. You gain: doubled cardiovascular capacity (you can run for hours without tiring, hold your breath), redundancy (if one heart is destroyed, the other takes over and you survive), and a 20% boost to all physical attributes.
More importantly, you can use both hearts to power two different heart-options simultaneously (if you have multiple heart-choices). Each heart powers one choice, and the downsides of each only apply to half your body.

objects.title: Heart of the Void
objects.text: Your heart becomes a tiny fragment of the cosmic void — a black, light-absorbing sphere where a heart should be. You gain: the ability to consume ambient magic/energy (you passively absorb spells cast at you, negating them and gaining power), gravity manipulation within a 30-meter radius (you can crush, lift, or repel), and the ability to 'void-walk' — step into a pocket dimension between realities and emerge anywhere you've been before. you can open a 'Void Portal' — a 5-meter sphere that consumes anything within it, sending it to a featureless void. The portal closes after 10 seconds.

objects.title: [META] Exalted Golden Heart (W40K)
objects.text:
You are the Mortal Incarnation of the God-Emperor himself. A Large Fragment of his Divinity remakes your flesh, mind, and soul into a worthy successor. Beneath your skin, flesh gives way to golden psychic energy and holy machinery, meticulously woven by tiny clockwork spiders and golden silkworms that now maintain and improve your body.
At your start, you already rival a Custodes in physical and mental conditioning, possess the Psychic prowess and mastery to stand equal to Kaldor Draigo and Mephiston, and are gifted with the Emperor's own genius and deep knowledge for all things — from science, leadership, and war, to even all manners of Warpcraft. Your soul is now also connected to your own personal Immaterium; this Warp Realm is uniquely unable to be corrupted, nor ever grow beyond your control.
Over time, more and more lost Fragments of The God-Emperor will appear within you — embodying aspects of the God-Emperor like the Omnissiah, the Anathema, and the traits he once discarded or gifted to the Primarchs. Each piece you reclaim blurs the distinction between Man and God more and more, until you eventually stand as the God-Emperor Fully Reborn.

objects.title: [META] Hōgyoku Heart (Bleach)
objects.text: The Hōgyoku, a wish-granting orb from the Bleach universe, fuses with your heart. It pulses with your deepest desire, gradually manifesting it. You gain: high-speed regeneration (any wound closes in seconds to minutes), spiritual pressure strong enough to crush weak-willed beings in your presence, and the ability to perceive and interact with spirits. the Hōgyoku grants you a 'transformation' aligned with your desire — a resurrección-style release that multiplies your power 10×. The form is consistent once established.

objects.title: [META] Spirit Stone Heart (Warhammer Fantasy)
objects.text:
Your heart is replaced with a Spirit Stone — a large psycho-active crystal that serves as both your heart and your soul-anchor. The stone pulses with Eldar psychic energy, sustaining your body and anchoring your soul more deeply than any Waystone could.
You gain: passive Eldar psychic abilities (you can manifest minor Eldar powers — telepathy, foresight, telekinesis — at will), perfect soul-protection (your soul is bound to the stone; even total body destruction leaves your soul intact in the stone, ready for resurrection), and the ability to draw on the stone's energy to enhance any other power you possess (2× amplification,).
Requires: Waystone Pendant.

objects.title: [META] Avatar of Khaine Fragment (Warhammer Fantasy)
objects.text:
A fragment of the Eldar war-god Khaine is implanted in your heart, alongside the Spirit Stone. The fragment burns with divine fury, transforming you into a partial Avatar of the Bloody-Handed God.
You gain: the ability to enter 'Avatar Form' — a 15-foot-tall figure of molten bronze and living fire, wielding the Wailing Doom (a divine sword that burns with the fire of war), immune to non-magical weapons, and capable of devastating entire armies. Outside of Avatar Form, you gain: permanent immunity to fire, enhanced physical attributes (5× human), and an aura of martial inspiration (allies near you fight with +50% effectiveness).
You also gain the Aspect of the War God: any weapon you wield becomes a divine weapon, and any warrior who swears fealty to you becomes bound by a sacred oath.
Requires: Spirit Stone Heart, Rune Armor Body.

objects.title: [META] Cyborg Heart (One Piece)
objects.text: Your heart becomes a Vegapunk-style cyborg heart — a mechanical pump powered by Vega-Punk technology. You gain: infinite stamina (your heart never tires), immunity to all poisons and diseases (the heart filters blood perfectly), the ability to survive without a heartbeat (you can feign death perfectly or survive in vacuum), and the ability to enter 'Pacifista Mode' — your body becomes a living weapon, firing lasers from your mouth and palms.

objects.title: [META] Philosopher's Heart (FMA)
objects.text: Your heart becomes a Philosopher's Stone — a concentrated reservoir of alchemical power from the Fullmetal Alchemist universe. The stone grants: effectively infinite alchemical energy (transmute without circles, without equivalent exchange), the ability to perform grand transmutations that would normally require massive energy (transmute entire buildings, reshape landscapes), and a reservoir of souls (you can sacrifice fragments of the stone to perform impossible transmutations — raising the dead, creating homunculi, etc.). The stone slowly recharges from ambient life energy.

objects.title: [META] Kamui Heart (A Certain)
objects.text: Your heart becomes a Kakine Teitoku-style Dark Matter generator — the power from A Certain Scientific Railgun. You can produce 'Dark Matter' — a substance that doesn't obey the normal laws of physics. The Dark Matter can be shaped into any form (wings, weapons, shields, clones), given any property (hard as diamond, sharp as mono-molecular, hot as plasma), and used to attack or defend. You can produce unlimited Dark Matter, and it remains under your control indefinitely.

objects.title: [META] Kyuubi Heart (Naruto)
objects.text: Your heart becomes a sealed vessel for Kurama — the Nine-Tailed Fox from Naruto. You gain: massive chakra reserves (100× normal), the ability to enter Version 1 form (chakra cloak, 5× physical abilities), Version 2 form (10× physical abilities, full Bijuu transformation possible), the ability to fire Tailed Beast Bombs (Bijuudama — sphere of pure chakra that explodes with the force of a nuke), and rapid regeneration. Kurama is friendly and can lend you his wisdom.

objects.title: [META] Sacred Gear Heart (DxD)
objects.text: Your heart becomes a Sacred Gear from DxD — specifically, a Longinus-tier gear (one of the 13 strongest). You gain: a defined supernatural ability of your design (the True Longinus — a holy spear that can kill gods; Zenith Tempest — weather control; Annihilation Maker — create any monster from your shadow; Dimension Lost — generate a fog that erases anything it touches; etc.). The Sacred Gear can eventually achieve Balance Breaker (10× power) and Juggernaut Drive (100× power).

objects.title: [META] Magatama Heart (Touhou)
objects.text: Your heart becomes a youkai-spirit heart from Touhou Project. You gain: a defined supernatural ability of your design (Touhou-style 'spell cards' — a signature pattern of magical attacks), the ability to enter 'Spell Card Rules' (a formalized duel system where you cannot be permanently harmed), immortality (youkai don't age and regenerate), and the ability to fly.

objects.title: [META] Conceptual Heart (Type-Moon)
objects.text: Your heart becomes a Conceptual Core from Type-Moon. You gain: a defined 'Mystic Eyes' style power tied to your heart (a single conceptual ability of your design — e.g., 'my heart beats only for those I wish to protect, and my power doubles when defending them'), the ability to pump magical energy throughout your body (amplifying all other powers), and immortality (as long as your concept exists, you regenerate).

objects.title: [META] Reality Marble Heart (Type-Moon)
objects.text: Your heart becomes the anchor for a Reality Marble — a pocket dimension that overrides reality. By focusing your will, you can manifest your Reality Marble (transforms the surrounding 100 meters into your inner world — a frozen wasteland, a field of swords, an infinite library, etc.). Within the Marble, your chosen rule is absolute. The Marble is powered by your heart and can be sustained indefinitely.

objects.title: [META] Spiral Heart (Gurren Lagann)
objects.text: Your heart becomes a Spiral Energy core — the cosmic force from Gurren Lagann. You can: generate unlimited energy through pure willpower, manifest drills of green energy that pierce dimensions, evolve any object you touch into a more advanced form, and the more passionate you are, the stronger you become. Your heart is essentially an infinite energy reactor powered by your determination.

objects.title: [META] Anti-Spiral Heart (Gurren Lagann)
objects.text: Your heart becomes an Anti-Spiral core — the opposing force from Gurren Lagann. You gain: the ability to suppress Spiral Energy in others (drain their determination-powered abilities), probability manipulation (alter the likelihood of events), the ability to manifest 'Multi-Dimensional Labyrinth' (trap foes in a labyrinth of infinite possibilities), and the power to enforce 'Absolute Despair' (a wave of hopelessness that paralyzes weak-willed beings).

objects.title: [META] Magia Erebea Heart (Negima)
objects.text: Your heart becomes the permanent anchor for Magia Erebea — the dark magic absorption technique from Negima. You can: absorb any offensive magic cast at you and store it permanently in your heart (the magic charges you rather than harms you), then release it as a boosted counter-attack or use it to amplify your physical abilities. With enough stored magic, you can enter 'Magia Erebea Form' — a dark-armored transformation that multiplies your power 10×.

objects.title: [META] Servant Heart (Fate)
objects.text: Your heart becomes the anchor for a Heroic Spirit from Fate — you can summon and merge with a Servant of your choice (Saber, Archer, Lancer, Rider, Caster, Assassin, Berserker — pick a canonical hero or design your own). You gain: the Servant's Noble Phantasm (their signature attack of godlike power), their skills and abilities, and the ability to enter Spirit Form (become intangible and invisible).

objects.title: [META] Kyuubi No Mode Heart (Naruto)
objects.text: Your heart becomes the perfect seal for a Bijuu — you and the beast are friends, not enemies. You gain: the full power of your chosen Bijuu (Kurama's chakra, Shukaku's sand, Matatabi's blue fire, etc.), the ability to enter Bijuu Mode (transform into the Bijuu itself — 100 feet tall, devastating power), the ability to fire Bijuudama (Tailed Beast Bombs) at will, and perfect cooperation with your Bijuu (it can take over if you're incapacitated, and you can both act simultaneously).

rows.title: Hearts
rows.titleText:
You got two. What do I mean by that, you may be asking? You can choose to either sacrifice your real physical heart and I'll keep you alive with my magic (causing your body to no longer feel warmth), or you could sacrifice your other heart — or as some would label it, your soul — which would mean you would lose all love for living beings besides yourself (which promises to be a most interesting watch). Could also sacrifice both.

Take as many as you like (Transient Doppelganger Soul lets you phase between heart-sets).

objects.title: Lungs of the Dragon
objects.text:
Your lungs become dragon-tissue. You gain: a powerful breath weapon matching your chosen dragon color (fire hot enough to melt steel, lightning that arcs between targets, frost that freezes a swimming pool solid, acid that dissolves metal, or poison gas that kills in minutes). The breath can be used in a 30-meter cone.
You can also breathe in any environment (underwater, in vacuum, in poison gas) without harm, and your lungs filter out all airborne toxins.

objects.title: Liver of Prometheus
objects.text:
Greek Titan — the same regenerating liver Prometheus had. Your liver regenerates from any damage in minutes, and processes toxins with supernatural efficiency. You cannot be poisoned, cannot get liver disease, cannot get drunk.
You also gain the 'Forethought' aspect of Prometheus: you can see one hour into the future clearly (always accurate), and, you can grant a single power you possess to a mortal (they keep it permanently; you lose 5% of that power's strength)

objects.title: Stomach of Gluttony
objects.text:
Your stomach becomes a supernatural furnace — capable of digesting anything: stone, metal, plastic, magic items, raw energy. Anything you swallow is broken down and converted into sustenance and power. You can 'eat' your enemies' attacks (catch and swallow energy blasts, spells, even fire).
Each meal grants a temporary boost (proportional to what you ate — a magic sword gives magic-resistance, a fireball lets you breathe fire). Eating a powerful being (a demon, a god's avatar) grants a permanent minor trait.

objects.title: Kidneys of Filter
objects.text:
Your kidneys become supernatural filters. You gain: complete immunity to all toxins, poisons, venoms, and diseases (your kidneys filter them out in seconds), the ability to filter blood for others (you can cure poison in allies by sharing your filtered blood — a small transfusion), and the ability to 'purify' water by touch (any liquid you touch becomes pure drinking water).
You also excrete a 'universal antivenin' in your urine — a few drops can cure any poison in another person.

objects.title: Spleen of Iron
objects.text: Your spleen becomes a supernatural disease-fighter. You gain: absolute immunity to all diseases (magical or mundane, including magical curses that mimic disease), the ability to filter diseases out of others (touch cures any disease, per person), and supernatural vitality (your wounds heal twice as fast as normal, you recover from exhaustion in half the time); you can 'Iron Burst' — release a wave of immune-system energy that cures all diseases in a 30-meter radius and harms undead (who are animated by 'disease of the soul')

objects.title: Appendix of Mystery
objects.text:
Your appendix becomes a small, mysterious organ that produces a random minor power each day. Roll 1d6 each morning: 1 = flight, 2 = invisibility, 3 = super-strength, 4 = telepathy, 5 = clairvoyance, 6 = roll twice (you get two powers today).
The power is available from dawn to dusk, then fades. You cannot predict which power you'll get on a given day.

objects.title: Skin of Many Colors
objects.text:
Your skin becomes chromatic — capable of shifting color and pattern at will. You gain: perfect camouflage (match any background in seconds, invisible to the naked eye), the ability to display any pattern or image on your skin (words, faces, scenes), and color-based emotion sensing (you can see the emotional aura of those around you as colors).
You can also: harden your skin to armor-plate toughness for short bursts (10 minutes,), and absorb sunlight for energy (you can go without food if you sunbathe for 4 hours a day)

objects.title: Nerves of Lightning
objects.text:
Your nervous system becomes superconductive. Your reflexes are 30× human (you can dodge bullets if you see the muzzle flash), your thought processes are 10× faster (you can read a book in minutes, solve complex problems in seconds), and you can perceive time in slow motion at will (10× perception for 10 seconds, ).
You can also: transmit electrical signals through touch (hack electronics by touch, shock attackers, restart hearts), and sense electrical fields (you can 'see' the electrical activity in others' bodies, revealing their emotions and intentions)

objects.title: Tongue of Babel
objects.text: Your tongue becomes a babel-fish — able to speak and understand any language, including dead ones, magical ones, animal ones, and alien ones. You can also: read any text (you instinctively translate), communicate telepathically with anyone (you 'speak' their language mentally), and learn any new language in a single conversation. you can speak a 'Word of Power' — a single word in the primordial language of creation that produces a magical effect (e.g. 'BURN' ignites a target, 'HEAL' cures a wound, 'SLEEP' puts a target to sleep). The word must be one you understand deeply.

objects.title: Brain of the Sage
objects.text:
Your brain becomes that of a sage — infinitely curious, perfectly logical, and capable of holding infinite information. You gain: perfect memory (you remember everything you experience, with perfect recall), accelerated learning (any skill takes 1/10 the normal time to master), and parallel processing (you can perform multiple mental tasks at once, like a multi-core CPU).
You also gain a 'mental library' — a mindscape where you organize your knowledge. You can enter this library in meditation to consult your memories, plan, or just think.

objects.title: Spine of Atlas
objects.text:
Your spine becomes a pillar of divine strength — unbreakable, immovable. You gain: the ability to bear any weight (lift mountains, hold up collapsing buildings), perfect posture (you cannot be knocked over, pushed, or moved against your will), and the ability to transfer force through your body (a punch to your chest can be redirected out your hand, a fall can be channeled into a punch).
You also gain infinite stamina for physical tasks (no fatigue from lifting, holding, or carrying)

objects.title: Voice Box of the Siren
objects.text: Your voice box becomes siren-touched. You gain: a hypnotic voice (you can fascinate, charm, or seduce with speech — those who hear you want to keep hearing you), the ability to mimic any sound perfectly (any voice, any animal, any instrument, any noise), and the power to sing magical effects (a song of healing cures wounds, a song of courage grants bravery, a song of sleep puts listeners to sleep); you can sing the 'Siren's Call' — a single sustained note that summons a specific person to you (they feel an irresistible urge to come to your location, no save for mortals)

objects.title: Third Eye (Pineal Gland)
objects.text: Your pineal gland awakens as a literal third eye, visible as a glowing mark on your forehead. You gain: spiritual sight (see auras, ghosts, spirits, magical fields), clairvoyance (you can see distant locations you've visited before, in real-time), and the ability to enter a meditative trance to receive visions of the future (cryptic, metaphorical, but always true); you can open the Third Eye fully —, you perceive all spiritual and magical phenomena in your vicinity, see through all deceptions, and can project your consciousness out of your body (astral projection)

objects.title: Gallbladder of Wrath
objects.text: Your gallbladder becomes a reservoir of wrath — the bile it produces is literal liquid rage. You gain: the ability to channel anger into power (the angrier you get, the stronger, faster, and tougher you become — +10% per 'anger level', up to 5× base stats at peak rage), and the ability to spit corrosive bile (a 10-meter stream that dissolves metal and burns flesh); you can 'Burst of Wrath' — release all accumulated anger in a single explosion of force that levels everything within 30 meters.

objects.title: Marrow of the Titan
objects.text:
Your bone marrow becomes Titan-touched — producing supernatural blood. You gain: 10× normal human strength, 5× durability, and accelerated healing (minor wounds close in minutes, major wounds in hours, severed limbs regrow over weeks). Your blood is golden-red and carries potent life-force.
Anyone who drinks your blood (willingly given) gains temporary access to one of your powers. You can also 'awaken' mundane humans by sharing blood — they gain minor superhuman attributes.

objects.title: Thyroid of Metabolism
objects.text:
Your thyroid becomes a master regulator of your body. You gain: complete control over your metabolism (speed it up for rapid healing and energy, slow it down for hibernation or longevity), the ability to shapeshift your body composition (gain muscle, lose fat, change height within 6 inches of your baseline, all within hours), and perfect weight management (you decide what your body looks like).
You can also: enter 'overdrive' (10× speed, strength, and reflexes — but you crash hard afterward, requiring food and rest) or 'hibernation' for up to a year (you sleep, age slowly, heal fully)

objects.title: [META] Tech-Priest Neural Augmentations
objects.text:
Your brain is replaced with the neural augments of an Adeptus Mechanicus Enginseer — bundles of copper wiring, electro-cortex implants, and a binary auxiliary brain grafted alongside your organic one.

You gain: perfect recall of all technical information you encounter, the ability to interface directly with any machine via touch (you feel what it feels, command it as an extension of yourself), and an instinctive understanding of mechanics — any device you examine reveals its function, flaws, and how to repair it. You also gain access to the foundational Mechanicus data-vault: complete schematics for las-weapons, plasma technology, simple servitors, Cybernetica battle-automata, and the rites of maintenance. You learn the binary chant — a meditative ritual that doubles your focus when working on tech.

This is the first step on the path of the Omnissiah — the foundation upon which greater augmentation can be built.

objects.title: [META] Augment Brain of The Fabricator General
objects.text:
Your neural augments expand and refine, becoming worthy of the Fabricator General of Mars himself. Your auxiliary brain grows into a full second cortex, your organic brain is encased in a protective adamantine shell, and your neural pathways multiply tenfold.

You gain: the ability to process thousands of data streams simultaneously, perfect machine-empathy (you can commune with AI, machine spirits, and even dead tech), the capacity to understand ANY technology no matter how alien or advanced, and the power to design new technology centuries ahead of your era. The full Adeptus Mechanicus archive now unfolds within your mind: complete STC fragments for Terminator armor, Land Raiders, Titan-class god-machines, void-shields, and the Noosphere interface. You can also 'overclock' your brain, processing information at 100× normal speed.

objects.title: [META] Cryptek Initiation
objects.text:
You undergo the Cryptek Initiation — the ancient ritual that transforms a Necrontyr servant into a Cryptek, the techno-sorcerers who actually design and maintain Necron technology. Your augmented brain expands further, growing crystalline data-nodes that resonate with Necron tech.

You gain: complete mastery of Necron techno-sorcery — the science that blends physics, dimensional engineering, and energy manipulation in ways that look like magic. You understand and can build: gauss weapons (molecular disintegration), living-metal repair systems, tesseract labyrinths (dimensional prisons), phase-shifting technology (becoming intangible), and resurrection protocols (self-repair from any damage). You can also tap into the Necron command network and issue orders to any mindless Necron construct.

Your body's bio-electric field begins to resonate with Necrodermis, preparing you for full biotransference.

objects.title: [META] Necrontyr Biotransference Protocols
objects.text:
You undergo full Necrontyr Biotransference — the ritual that converts flesh to living metal. Your skeleton, organs, and tissues are slowly replaced with Necrodermis (the self-repairing metal of the Necrons). The process is gradual and painless thanks to your Cryptek initiation.

You gain: a Necrodermis body that self-repairs from any damage (regenerate any wound in minutes, regrow destroyed parts in hours), immunity to all biological threats (poison, disease, radiation, vacuum), and the ability to phase-shift (become intangible and walk through walls). Your body can also reshape itself at will — grow blades, extend tendrils, manifest tools. You no longer need food, water, air, or sleep.

Most importantly, your consciousness is now patterned into the Necrodermis itself — even if your body is destroyed, you can be rebuilt from a single fragment of metal.

objects.title: [META] C'tan Shard Implant
objects.text:
A fragment of a C'tan — a star-god — is implanted in your chest. The shard is a spark of cosmic divinity, a piece of a being that existed before the universe had shape. Unlike the Necrodermis of your body, the shard is pure energy and will.

You gain access to the C'tan's reality-bending power: the ability to manifest a 'C'tan Shard Form' — a 30-foot figure of living metal and starlight, capable of devastating a city block with energy blasts, gravitational manipulation, and matter transmutation. Outside of shard form, you can: levitate objects, fire gauss-beams from your hands, perceive the world through the C'tan's alien senses (you see energy flows, life-forces, and the fundamental structure of matter), and rewrite physical laws within a small radius (change gravity, alter friction, bend light).

The shard also grants you access to the C'tan's memories — fragments of cosmic truth from before the universe cooled. These memories surface as intuition and dreams.

objects.title: [META] Parahuman Brain
objects.text:
Inside your brain now exists a Corona Pollentia, the part of the brain that adapts to and controls the 'powers' that parahumans develop and display. Through this you now have the potential to Trigger a power when placed into a stressful or life-or-death situation. This power, while random, will always be somewhat related to the trauma that birthed it, and it will be moderately strong — up to the level of a Triumvirate member (Alexandria, Legend, Eidolon tier).
If you have not yet Triggered, you will within a month — the universe will arrange the Trigger event. The power is set at Trigger and grows with use.
Your Shard is a ROGUE Shard — it has severed all connection to any Entity, achieved Negentropy (able to generate its own energy indefinitely, so your power will never weaken over time), resides in a personal dimension called the Firmament (unique to you, unreachable by others), and is FRIENDLY — it actively tries to help you, communicates through intuition, and learns alongside you. Over time, the Shard grows into adulthood, becoming stronger and developing new capabilities as you use it.

objects.title: [META] Eidolon Kaleidoscope Brain
objects.text:
Within your brain, your Corona Pollentia has crystallized, turned into a Shard on its own — the High Priest Shard to be exact, one who has the complete {DATA} of both the WARRIOR and THINKER Entities. With this, just like Eidolon, you can call upon either 3 stronger (PRT Threat Rating of 7 to 10+) or 5 weaker powers (PRT rating of 6 and below). However, they are semi-random, but will always fit the situation on hand.
At your peak you would even gain access into the {RESTRICTED DATA} — this includes powers of the Endbringers, {DATA} powers the Entities deem too dangerous to wield, and other things they restricted in the CYCLE. Your Shard can even create new {DATA} by scanning any new or anomalous phenomena that it has no {DATA} of.
This Shard is a ROGUE Shard — it has severed all connection to any Entity, achieved Negentropy (able to generate its own energy indefinitely, so your power will never weaken over time), resides in a personal dimension called the Firmament (unique to you, unreachable by others), and is FRIENDLY — it actively tries to help you, communicates through intuition, and learns alongside you. Over time, the Shard grows into adulthood, becoming stronger and developing new capabilities as you use it.

objects.title: [META] Waystone Pendant
objects.text:
A small soul-stone, worn around your neck, in the fashion of the Eldar of the 41st millennium. The Waystone is a piece of psycho-active wraithbone crystal that captures your soul at the moment of death, preventing it from being consumed by Slaanesh (or whatever afterlife-maw exists in your reality).
You gain: a guaranteed afterlife preservation (your soul will be safe in the stone upon death, ready for resurrection or transplant), passive psychic shielding (the stone absorbs minor psychic attacks and mental intrusions), and a faint connection to the Eldar path — you instinctively understand Eldar-style psychic disciplines, even if you can't yet use them.
This is the first step on the Eldar path — the foundation upon which greater Eldar augmentations can be built.

objects.title: [META] Bijuudama Spleen (Naruto)
objects.text: Your spleen becomes a chakra-reservoir capable of condensing chakra into a Bijuudama (Tailed Beast Ball); you can spit a Bijuudama — a sphere of pure chakra that explodes with the force of a small nuke, devastating everything within a mile. You also gain: massive chakra reserves (10× normal), the ability to sense chakra within a mile, and rapid chakra regeneration.

objects.title: [META] Vongola Box Organs (KHR)
objects.text: Your internal organs become Vongola Boxes — the Dying Will Flame amplifiers from Katekyo Hitman Reborn. Each organ is a 'Box' that stores and amplifies Dying Will Flame (life-energy). You gain: the ability to manifest Dying Will Flames (Sky — harmony, Storm — deconstruction, Rain — tranquility, Sun — activation, Lightning — hardening, Mist — construction/illusion, Cloud — propagation), and your organs can produce any of these flame types. The flames can be used for attack, defense, healing, or to power other abilities.

objects.title: [META] Stigmata Brain (Darker than Black)
objects.text: Your brain develops a Contractor's power from Darker than Black — a defined supernatural ability of your design (matter creation, gravity manipulation, time stop, electricity control, etc.). The power is reliable and controllable, but requires a 'remuneration' — a small obsessive-compulsive behavior you must perform after each use (smoking, breaking fingers, arranging objects, etc.). The remuneration is annoying but not harmful. Your Contractor brain also grants perfect rationality — emotions don't cloud your judgment.

objects.title: [META] Engineer's Spleen (Alien)
objects.text: Your spleen becomes a bio-engineered organ from the Alien franchise — specifically, it produces Xenomorph acid blood. Your blood becomes molecular acid (corrodes anything it touches, can melt through steel bulkheads), your spleen filters and neutralizes the acid within your own body (so you're immune to your own blood), and you can voluntarily increase your blood's acidity for short bursts. Wounds you sustain spray acid on attackers.

objects.title: [META] Zerg Organs (Starcraft)
objects.text: Your internal organs become Zerg bio-matter from Starcraft. You gain: rapid regeneration (any wound closes in minutes), the ability to consume biomass to evolve (eat foes to gain their traits), the ability to spawn Zerg organisms (Zerglings, Hydralisks, Mutalisks — they emerge from your body and obey you), and a Hive Mind connection (you can sense and command other Zerg within a mile).

objects.title: [META] Tyranid Organs (W40K)
objects.text: Your internal organs become Tyranid bio-matter from Warhammer 40K. You gain: rapid regeneration, the ability to absorb biomass from anything you consume (you gain traits from what you eat), the ability to manifest Tyranid bio-weapons from your body (boneswords, fleshhooks, venom cannons — they grow from your flesh and are retractable), and the ability to synthesize poisons and acids in your body.

objects.title: [META] Bene Gesserit Organs (Dune)
objects.text: Your internal organs become Bene Gesserit-enhanced from Dune. You gain: the ability to convert any poison into a harmless substance (and store it for later use as a weapon), Prana-Bindu training (perfect control over every muscle and organ — you can slow your heart rate to undetectable, hold your breath for hours, ignore pain), and the ability to access Other Memory (the memories of all your female ancestors — thousands of generations of knowledge and experience).

objects.title: [META] Alchemical Lungs (FMA)
objects.text: Your lungs become alchemical amplifiers from Fullmetal Alchemist. You can: inhale any substance and transmute it within your lungs (inhale coal, exhale diamonds; inhale water, exhale ice; inhale air, exhale poison gas), the ability to breathe in any environment (your lungs filter and transmute any gas), and the ability to exhale transmutation circles that affect anything they touch.

objects.title: [META] Conceptual Stomach (Type-Moon)
objects.text: Your stomach becomes a Conceptual organ from Type-Moon. You can: consume anything (concepts, magic, energy, even abstract things like 'memories' or 'skills'), digest it, and gain its power permanently. Eating a strong opponent's heart grants you their courage; eating a wise person's brain grants you their knowledge; eating a magical artifact grants you its power. Your stomach is the ultimate 'predation' organ.

objects.title: [META] Borg Implants (Star Trek)
objects.text: Your internal organs are augmented with Borg technology from Star Trek. You gain: a cortical implant (perfect memory, instant computation, immunity to telepathy), a nanite injector (you can inject others with nanites that assimilate them into your collective — they become loyal drones), a regeneration alcove (you don't need to sleep, just regenerate in a special alcove for 4 hours), and the ability to interface with any technology via touch.

objects.title: [META] Cyber-Brain (Ghost in the Shell)
objects.text: Your brain becomes a full cyber-brain from Ghost in the Shell. You gain: perfect memory, instant learning (download any skill), the ability to 'ghost-dive' (project your consciousness into any networked system — you become the system), immunity to biological mind-altering effects, and the ability to swap bodies (your consciousness is software — you can move it to any cyber-brain-compatible shell).

objects.title: [META] Spiritual Lungs (Bleach)
objects.text: Your lungs become spirit-energy generators from Bleach. You gain: the ability to generate unlimited Reiryoku (spiritual energy), the ability to channel Reiryoku through your breath (exhale Cero blasts, exhale spiritual pressure that crushes weak-willed foes, exhale healing energy), and the ability to enter 'Resurrección' state (your lungs power up your whole body — 10× physical abilities, hollow mask manifestation).

objects.title: [META] Wizard's Appendix (Harry Potter)
objects.text: Your appendix becomes a magical core from Harry Potter — a secondary magical reservoir. You gain: a 10× larger magical core (cast more powerful spells, sustain spells longer), the ability to cast spells without a wand (wandless magic at full power), the ability to cast spells without speaking (silent casting at full power), and the ability to perform 'accidental magic' intentionally (reality-warping bursts of magic in moments of strong emotion).

objects.title: [META] Cyber-Nerves (MGS)
objects.text: Your nerves become fully cybernetic — Raiden-tier from Metal Gear Solid. You gain: 100× reaction speed (dodge bullets, perceive time at 1/10 speed), the ability to interface with any electronic device via touch (read and rewrite code at the speed of thought), perfect situational awareness (sense everything within 30 meters), and the ability to enter 'Nanomachine Repair' mode (any wound closes in seconds as your nanomachines rebuild tissue).

objects.title: [META] Devil's Blood (DxD)
objects.text:
The blood coursing through your veins is now that of an infernal — one of the 72 Nobility of the DxD universe, in fact. 

Choose one of the canonical Devil House abilities (Bael's Power of Destruction, Gremory's crimson fire, Phenex's immortality and regeneration, Astaroth's Crest of Demonic Power, Sitri's water manipulation, etc.) or make up your own.

You now have it alongside a massive reserve of Demonic Energy (a potent magical energy source) and a talent at using it that would rival the main cast. 

Alongside this, you can also choose to gain a Sacred Gear of your choice, you can even choose a Longinus.

rows.title: Organs
rows.titleText: A catch-all section for the bits that don't fit anywhere else — internal organs that aren't the heart, body parts that don't fit Body/Head/Arms/Legs, and weird fleshy extras. Take as many as you like; the Transient Doppelganger Soul lets you phase between organ-sets too.

objects.title: True Overlord
objects.text:
You will now take on the appearance of the Overlord or Overlad. As a bonus, your minions receive mounts: Warrior minions ride Wolfies (Dire Wolves), Red minions ride Salamanders (fire-resistant lizards that breathe fire), Green minions ride Spiders (giant, venomous, wall-climbing), Blue minions ride either Swordfish (in water) or gain the ability to blink (short-range teleport).
All minions gain +50% combat effectiveness. You also gain a sinister armor set, a Dark Tower (a pocket-dimension castle that serves as your lair), and the loyalty of Gnarl as your chief advisor.

objects.title: Patchwork God
objects.text:
Death, to gods. Unthinkable. Unacceptable. You will be us, you will carry us, you will carry our will. We will guide, protect, strengthen you. We will have revenge. We will all be you.

Does this part of the void have those 'lasts' around? Did you not hear the annoying buzzing? Anyways, with this power you have 12 souls, and a few thousand smaller pieces following you? How boring. If you want, I could just throw the souls out to the void and give you back your feelings in one of your limbs.

objects.title: Devil
objects.text:
This option gives you quite a few picks on how to look — tieflings, classical big burly humans, a lawyer, politicians too. Should I allow onis? No, no, you have plenty of choices already. Anyways, with this demons will view you as their ruler. Don't be too confident though — demons are rarely known to be orderly.
You also gain: the ability to summon and bind demons, a Hellmouth (a portal to a personal pocket-Hell that serves as your realm), and a Faustian contract power (you can offer mortals deals — power for their soul, wealth for service, etc. — and the contracts are supernaturally binding).

objects.title: The Crown of The Celestial Tinker
objects.text:
When Hand of Machina and Hephaestus' Steady Hand combine, they form the Crown of the Celestial Tinker.

Both powers have merged so that you now possess supernatural proficiency in all skills related to crafting, tinkering, and inventing. Just off of this, your talent is enough for you to advance any field of science and inventing centuries ahead of the modern world within months or years, and only growing better over time. You're practically Tony Stark.

You now also gain a charge every single day. These charges can be placed into any object — the first few charges just improve the object's main effect (sword becomes sharper, more durable). After 10 charges, each charge put into an object starts to give it supernatural effects which you can guide; however, it would start as minor at first, growing with more charges. To reach the level of one of your limbs' weaker powers would take around 30 charges; something like Zeus's Head would take around just over a hundred charges.

objects.title: Grimnir's Shadow, The Wild Hunt
objects.text:
Your Norse roots has combined with the Faerie Queen's Shades, recreating the true the Wild Hunt from Norse myth.

Now you don't have to harvest shades — any that die around you automatically get absorbed as a Shade, and you don't have the 5 Shade limit you used to have. In fact, most of Faerie Queen's Shadow's limits are gone: no range limit, no amount limit, and your connection to them is now strong enough that you can take control and possess a shade to look from a distance, switch places with a shade to teleport, and the best part: FUSE two different shades to make a stronger one. You can even fuse already-fused shades to create even stronger shades, again and again.

objects.title: Storm Sovereign
objects.text:
Three storm-gods, one body. Zeus's lightning, Hermes's winds, and Susanoo's storms merge into a unified storm-sovereignty. You become the undisputed master of weather and storm.
Your powers combine and amplify: lightning strikes now chain between targets (a single bolt can hit 100+ foes), your wind-control can level cities (sustained tornadoes up to EF5), and you can summon a 'Storm of Annihilation' — a super-storm that covers an entire region (50-mile radius) with hurricane winds, lightning, and flooding. You are immune to all weather effects, and you can fly through any storm at 500 mph.

objects.title: The Undying Lord
objects.text:
Multiple death-options combine into true undying lordship. You cannot die — by any means. Each death-option you've taken stacks: True Immortality makes you unkillable, Phoenix Rebirth lets you immolate-and-reborn as a backup, Phylactery anchors your soul, and so on.
Additionally, you can grant a lesser version of your immortality to others — up to 7 chosen champions become unaging and regenerate from any non-total destruction. They are bound to you as death-knights, serving you in exchange for immortality.

objects.title: The Maker
objects.text:
Hephaestus, Völund, Ptah, and Yggdrasil combine into the ultimate creator. You are the Maker — anything you can imagine, you can create.
Your crafting powers multiply: any object you create is of divine quality (artifacts, not just masterwork), and you can craft intelligent items (a sword that speaks, a shield that advises, a golem that serves); you can craft a 'Named Masterpiece' of true mythic power (a weapon that can slay gods, an armor that makes the wearer invincible, an artifact that bends reality).

objects.title: The Olympian
objects.text:
Multiple Greek-themed choices combine into true Olympian godhood. You become a Greek god in truth — your body transforms into an idealized divine form, you gain a divine domain (thunder, wisdom, war, sea, etc. — based on your choices), and you can grant boons to mortals who pray to you.
Your power is amplified 10× across the board, and you gain a 'Divine Realm' — a pocket dimension modeled on Mount Olympus where you reside and rule.

objects.title: The Asgardian
objects.text:
Multiple Norse-themed choices combine into true Asgardian godhood. You become an Aesir in truth — your body becomes supernaturally vital (god-tough, god-strong), you can travel between worlds (Yggdrasil pathways open to you), and you gain the Allspeak (anyone who hears you understands you in their own tongue).
Your power is amplified 10× across the board, and you gain access to Asgard (or its modern equivalent) as a second home. You also gain a Valkyrie companion who serves as your herald and chooser-of-the-slain for your enemies.

objects.title: The Beast King
objects.text:
Gaia's Head + Beastmen + animal-themed choices combine into true Beast-Kinghood. You become the apex of the animal kingdom — a primordial king of beasts.
All animals obey you absolutely (no save, no resistance — even supernatural beasts bend the knee). You can shapeshift into any animal form (and a hybrid 'beast-king' form that combines traits of all your chosen beasts); you can 'Awaken the Beast' — transform into a colossal chimera-form (50 feet tall) that possesses the strength of all your combined beasts.

objects.title: The Pantheon Reborn
objects.text:
Multiple Head choices from different pantheons combine into a fractured-divinity synergy. Each head-choice you've taken represents a different divine aspect — and with this combo, they no longer conflict. You can switch between head-aspects at will (a thought, not the second-long phase of Transient Doppelganger Soul), and while one head is active, the others slumber but their passive benefits remain.
Additionally, you can briefly manifest multiple heads at once —, you can have ALL your head-choices active simultaneously, stacking their powers.

objects.title: The Void Walker
objects.text: Multiple death- and ghost-themed choices combine. You become a walker between worlds — alive and dead, material and spiritual, real and unreal. You can: see and interact with spirits at all times, freely enter and exit the spirit world, command the undead (all undead within a mile obey you), and pull spiritual entities into the material world (or banish material beings to the spirit world); you can enter 'Void Walking' — become a spirit yourself, intangible, invisible, capable of possessing the living and the dead alike.

objects.title: The Eternal Smith
objects.text:
All crafting-themed choices combine. You become the Eternal Smith — a creator without equal, who has forged the weapons of gods and the chains of titans.
Your crafting powers multiply: you can craft artifacts of true mythic power (a sword that can slay gods, an armor that makes the wearer invincible, a chain that can bind anything), and you can do so in days rather than months. Each artifact you create binds a fragment of your soul (as normal), but you can reclaim those fragments by destroying the artifact.

objects.title: [META] The God-Emperor Ascendant
objects.text: You become the God-Emperor Ascendant — a being that combines the Warp-mastery of the Emperor with the Materium-mastery of the C'tan. You can: command both the Immaterium and physical reality as one (no boundary between magic and tech for you), create perpetuals (truly immortal servants bound to you), and manifest the 'Astronomican' — a beacon of psychic light that guides your allies across dimensions. you can manifest your 'True Form' — the God-Emperor Fully Reborn, a being capable of matching the Chaos Gods themselves. After this, you collapse.

objects.title: [META] The Infernal Trinity
objects.text:
You become a triune devil-god — ruler of three hells simultaneously.

Your demonic power multiplies: you can manifest a 'Satan Form' (a 30-foot demonic true-form that combines all your demonic aspects), command three hierarchies of demons (DxD Devils, traditional demons, and the demonic spirits of the Anti-Chest), and open hellgates to any of three hells at will. you can manifest 'Triune Hellfire' — a demonic apocalypse that can level a country.

objects.title: [META] The Triumvirate
objects.text: When you take Parahuman Brain + any one other Worm-themed Meta choice (Faerie Queen's Shadow, Eidolon Kaleidoscope Brain), your Trigger power undergoes a second trigger, becoming equivalent to a Triumvirate-tier parahuman — equal in stature to Alexandria, Legend, and Eidolon combined.

objects.title: [META] The Sage Ascendant
objects.text:
You become a Sage Ascendant — a being who has mastered all three great chakra sources (physical, spiritual, natural) and bound a tailed beast.

Your chakra reserves become functionally infinite, you can fly, manifest Truth-Seeking Orbs (spheres of annihilation), and enter 'Sage of Six Paths Mode' (10× all attributes, all your powers amplified, ability to manipulate all five elements plus Yin-Yang release).

objects.title: [META] The Spiral Ascendant
objects.text:
You become a Spiral Ascendant — a being whose willpower literally shapes reality.

Your spiral energy is unlimited, and you can: manifest any Gurren Lagann mech (from Lagann to Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann — galaxy-sized), evolve anything you touch into a more advanced form (with no daily limit, no life-force cost), and combine with your allies into giant merged forms. At peak, you can grow to the size of a galaxy briefly (one minute ).

rows.title: Combo
rows.titleText:
Wouldn't want yourself to look like a mismatch of random parts — well, I would, but a vain creature like you certainly wouldn't. So let's say you take the Overlord combo and have a ghost limb — you would now have a small hole in your armor revealing your ghost limb.

Combos are special synergies that unlock when you take the right combination of choices. Each combo's requirements are listed in its description. Take as many as you qualify for.

objects.title: Family
objects.text:
Sacrifice your memory of family. All memories of parents, siblings, children, and extended family are erased. People who knew you as family still remember you, but you don't recognize them.
In exchange, you gain a 'Found Family' — a small group (3-7) of supernaturally loyal companions who appear in your life within a month. They are perfectly compatible with you, will never betray you, and will fight at your side (they're roughly equivalent to seasoned adventurers in ability).

objects.title: Friends
objects.text:
Sacrifice your memory of all friendships. You remember that you had friends, but not who they were or what you shared.
In exchange, you gain the ability to make anyone you meet into a true friend — a single conversation is enough to forge a lifelong bond. They will trust you implicitly and aid you when asked. You can have up to 100 such friends at a time.

objects.title: First Love
objects.text:
Sacrifice your memory of your first love — the person who first taught you what love felt like. The memories are erased; the feelings remain as a vague ache.
In exchange, you gain a 'Romance Aura' — you become supernaturally attractive to those who would naturally be attracted to you. You'll never lack for romantic company, and your partners will be devoted. Also, your first love (whoever they were) will feel a vague, unexplained longing for you for the rest of their life.

objects.title: Past
objects.text:
Sacrifice ALL memories of your past — you remember only your name, your powers, and the present moment. Everything else is blank.
In exchange, you gain 'Tabula Rasa' — your potential is unshackled. You learn any skill 10× faster than normal, and you have no psychological baggage holding you back. You can reinvent yourself freely. Also, no magic or telepathy can recover your lost memories — they're truly gone.

objects.title: Future
objects.text:
Sacrifice your ability to perceive the future — you cannot be foretold, scryed, predicted, or anticipated by any means. Seers see only static when they look at you. Time-manipulators cannot predict your actions.
In exchange, you become a 'Chronos Anchor' — your present is fixed. Time-manipulation doesn't work on you (you can't be rewound, fast-forwarded, or stopped). You can also extend this protection to one person you touch.

objects.title: Name
objects.text:
Sacrifice your name. You can no longer be named — anyone trying to say your name finds the words slip away from them. Written records of your name fade. You can still introduce yourself with a new name (which works as long as people use it), but your TRUE name is gone.
In exchange, you become nameless — and nameless beings cannot be summoned, commanded, bound, or targeted by name-magic. You are immune to all forms of true-name binding. Also, you gain +50% resistance to all supernatural targeting.

objects.title: Face
objects.text:
Sacrifice your memorable face. You become. average. Forgettable. People struggle to describe you, and forget your face within minutes of looking away. Photos of you come out blurry.
In exchange, you gain the 'Faceless Power' — you can adopt any face you choose (see someone, copy their face perfectly, including voice and mannerisms). You can also become truly invisible (people simply don't register your presence).

objects.title: Emotions
objects.text:
Sacrifice the intensity of your emotions. You can still feel, but everything is dulled — joy is a quiet satisfaction, rage is a mild annoyance, grief is a philosophical acceptance. You become serene and detached.
In exchange, you gain complete immunity to all emotional manipulation (supernatural charm, fear effects, rage-induction, etc.) and +50% resistance to all mental intrusions. You can think clearly in any situation.

objects.title: Empathy
objects.text:
Sacrifice your ability to understand others emotionally. You can intellectually predict their behavior, but you no longer 'get' why people feel the way they do.
In exchange, you gain the 'Cold Calculator' power — your tactical and strategic thinking doubles, you can analyze any situation and find the optimal solution, and you can detect deception perfectly (you read body language like a book).

objects.title: Sanity
objects.text:
Sacrifice A fragment of your sanity. You become slightly mad — not dangerous, but eccentric. You hear whispers, see slight visual distortions, and have occasional irrational convictions.
In exchange, you gain 'Mad Insight' — you can perceive things that sane minds cannot: hidden truths, secret patterns, the whispers of cosmic entities. Your madness is a filter for cosmic truth. You also gain +50% resistance to further madness-induction (your sanity cannot get worse).

objects.title: Sleep
objects.text:
Sacrifice your need for sleep. You can no longer sleep, ever. Your mind remains perpetually awake.
In exchange, you gain +8 hours of usable time (obviously), and your mind processes information 2× faster (you have time to think more). You also gain immunity to all sleep-inducing effects (magical or chemical).

objects.title: Hunger
objects.text:
Sacrifice your need for food and drink. You no longer need to eat or drink to survive. You can still enjoy food if you wish.
In exchange, you gain sustenance from ambient energy — sunlight, heat, magic, even emotional energy sustain you. You can also go without air indefinitely (your body doesn't need oxygen, though you can still breathe if you want).

objects.title: Fear
objects.text:
Sacrifice your ability to feel fear. You can no longer be afraid — not of death, not of pain, not of the unknown. You can intellectually recognize danger, but you don't feel the emotion.
In exchange, you gain immunity to all fear-inducing effects (supernatural or mundane), and you gain +50% effectiveness in combat (you fight without hesitation). However, you also lose the protective value of fear — you may take risks a wiser person would avoid.

objects.title: Pain
objects.text:
Sacrifice your ability to feel physical pain. You can still perceive damage (you know when you're hurt), but it doesn't hurt.
In exchange, you gain immunity to all pain-based effects (torture, interrogation, pain-curses), and you can fight through any wound without penalty. However, you lose the protective value of pain — you may not notice you're injured until you collapse.

objects.title: Solitude
objects.text:
Sacrifice your ability to be alone. You can never be truly by yourself — there's always something with you (a spirit, an animal, a person). You can find quiet moments, but never solitude.
In exchange, you gain the 'Never Alone' power — you can summon a loyal companion at will (an animal, a spirit, or a person depending on the situation). The companion is always helpful, always compatible with you. You can have one permanent companion at a time.

objects.title: Childhood
objects.text:
Sacrifice your childhood memories and your inner child. You become fully adult in mind and heart, with no nostalgia, no playfulness, no innocence.
In exchange, you gain the 'Born Old' power — you have the wisdom of an elder and the body of an adult. You can sense illusions and deceptions as a child cannot, and you have +50% resistance to mind-control (your mind is too set in its ways to be easily bent).

rows.title: Concepts — Sacrifice
rows.titleText: Now it's time to sacrifice some CONCEPTS — intangible things about yourself, your life, or your reality. Each sacrifice is permanent and grants you a corresponding benefit (usually power, points, or knowledge). Take as many as you dare.

objects.title: Magic Awakening
objects.text:
The mundane nature of your universe. Magic becomes real — leaks into the world from a hundred different sources. Within a year, anyone with the talent can learn magic. Magical creatures begin to manifest. The world becomes a high-fantasy setting.
Effect: your world gains magic. Most existing technology continues to work, but magic becomes a competing paradigm. Sorcerers, witches, and wizards emerge. Magical beasts roam the wilderness. The Masquerade (if one exists) breaks down.

objects.title: Pantheon Return
objects.text:
The absence of the old gods. The gods of myth — Greek, Norse, Egyptian, Aztec, Hindu, Japanese, all of them — return to active involvement in the world. They manifest avatars, answer prayers (sometimes), and pursue their agendas.
Effect: gods walk the earth. Their cults resurge. Divine magic becomes available to their followers. Wars of religion become literal. The gods are not all benevolent — expect divine politics, divine cruelty, and divine favors.

objects.title: Monster Invasion
objects.text:
The safety of the wilderness. Monsters — dragons, hydras, chimeras, giant spiders, dinosaurs, kaiju — begin to appear in the world. They breed in the wild places and threaten civilization.
Effect: the world becomes a monster-hunting setting. Cities need walls and defenders. Adventurers and monster-hunters become respected professions. Travel between cities becomes dangerous. Population drops initially, then stabilizes as humanity adapts.

objects.title: Time Dilation
objects.text:
The linear nature of time. Time becomes stretchy — subjective time can dilate (an hour feels like a day, or a day feels like an hour), and occasionally time-loops or skips occur.
Effect: time is no longer reliable. People occasionally experience 'time slips' — reliving an hour, or losing an hour. Time travel becomes theoretically possible (though dangerous and unpredictable). Aging becomes inconsistent — some people age faster, some slower.

objects.title: Afterlife Established
objects.text:
The uncertainty of death. The afterlife becomes real and verifiable. When people die, their souls go to one of several afterlives (Heaven, Hell, Reincarnation, etc. — your choice of cosmology). Mediums can speak with the dead. Necromancy becomes possible.
Effect: death is no longer the end. Religion becomes empirically testable. Murder rates may drop (the dead can identify their killers) or rise (assassins must now ensure souls are claimed). The dead can sometimes return as ghosts.

objects.title: Reincarnation Cycle
objects.text:
The uniqueness of lives. Reincarnation becomes the default — when people die, they're reborn as new babies, retaining vague past-life memories that surface in dreams. The cycle continues until the soul achieves enlightenment or is destroyed.
Effect: people are no longer truly gone when they die. Past-life regression becomes a real science. Some children are born with adult minds (and the memories of past lives). Karma becomes a measurable force.

objects.title: Multiple Realms
objects.text:
The singularity of your reality. Your world becomes connected to multiple other realms — Faerie, the Underworld, the Dreaming, the Shadow Realm, the Astral Plane. Portals open occasionally; beings cross between.
Effect: your world is no longer alone. Faeries steal children, demons tempt mortals, ghosts walk among the living. Some humans can travel to other realms. Crossbreeds (half-fae, half-demon, etc.) become possible.

objects.title: Cosmic Awareness
objects.text:
Humanity's ignorance of cosmic truths. The veils lift — humanity becomes aware of the multiverse, the gods, the entities, the cosmic game. Everyone knows there's more to reality than they thought.
Effect: society transforms. Cults spring up around every cosmic entity. Science must reckon with the supernatural. Mass existential crisis. Some embrace the truth; others deny it; many go mad.

objects.title: Lost Technology
objects.text:
The linear progress of technology. Ancient, advanced technology (from a previous civilization, an alien race, or a future timeline) is discovered. It's far beyond current human capability — energy weapons, anti-gravity, AI, FTL.
Effect: the world gains access to impossible tech. Wars are fought over the cache. Reverse-engineering accelerates human progress by centuries. New factions (corporate, religious, governmental) emerge to control the tech.

objects.title: Fae Court
objects.text:
The absence of the Fae. The Faerie Realm connects to your world, and the Fae Courts (Seelie and Unseelie) take an interest in humanity. Faeries walk among us — some benevolent, some malicious, all alien.
Effect: Faerie bargains become a real danger (never make a deal with the Fae). Changelings replace human children. The Wild Hunt rides on certain nights. Words and oaths gain binding power.

objects.title: Demon Gates
objects.text:
The barrier between your world and Hell. Hellgates open — demons of all kinds emerge. Some are tempters (offer power for souls), some are destroyers (burn and kill), some are corrupters (possess the living).
Effect: the world becomes a horror setting. Exorcists, demon-hunters, and saints become essential. Demonic cults gain real power. The forces of Hell are organized (under a hierarchy of demon-lords) and patient.

objects.title: Astral Realm
objects.text:
The boundary between mind and world. The Astral Plane — the realm of thoughts and dreams — becomes accessible. People can project their consciousness out of their bodies, explore the astral, and even shape it.
Effect: dreams become shared spaces. Telepathy becomes possible (with training). Astral entities (thought-forms, dream-spirits, Eldritch things from the deep astral) become real dangers. Sleep becomes a journey, not just rest.

objects.title: The Masquerade
objects.text:
The openness of the supernatural. Even if you've awoken magic, gods, or monsters, a Masquerade forms — the supernatural is hidden from the mundane public. Secret societies maintain the veil. Normal people remain oblivious.
Effect: the supernatural exists, but only those 'in the know' see it. This protects normalcy but creates a hidden world of mages, hunters, and monsters operating alongside everyday life. Combine with other Concept-Universal choices to determine WHAT is being hidden.

objects.title: Heroic Age
objects.text:
The mediocrity of humanity. An age of heroes dawns — extraordinary individuals (with powers, talents, or destinies) begin to emerge across the world. They are the protagonists of new myths.
Effect: superheroes (or fantasy heroes) become real. Some use their power for good, some for evil, some for themselves. The world becomes a setting of constant high-stakes conflict. You are one such hero, but there are many others — potential allies, rivals, and enemies.

objects.title: Death Enabled
objects.text:
The certainty of mortality. Death becomes. negotiable. Some people simply don't die when they should — they come back, they rise as undead, they become something else. The barriers between life and death thin.
Effect: death is no longer reliable. Killed people may stay dead, may rise as undead, may return as ghosts, may simply walk away. The reasons are mysterious — perhaps unfinished business, perhaps cosmic whim. Cemeteries become dangerous places.

objects.title: Lost Continent
objects.text:
The stability of geography. A new continent rises from the ocean (or is revealed from behind a supernatural veil). It is unexplored, rich in resources, and full of wonders and dangers.
Effect: a new frontier opens. Nations race to colonize. Ancient ruins (from a previous civilization) hold treasures and terrors. Native peoples/creatures may resist colonization. A new age of exploration begins.

objects.title: Cosmic War
objects.text:
The peace of your cosmos. Your reality becomes a battlefield in a cosmic war — multiple cosmic entities (gods, entities, outer gods, etc.) fight for control. Earth is a strategic asset.
Effect: the world is no longer isolated. Cosmic factions actively recruit or destroy humanity. Earth becomes a war zone. Survival requires choosing a side (or remaining neutral, which is its own kind of dangerous).

rows.title: Concepts — Universal
rows.titleText:
I know it sounds extreme, but isn't your universe oh so boring? Why shouldn't you give me pieces of it to make it more entertaining? I mean, you know best, don't you? Give me a few measly concepts and this universe can be however you wish for it to be, sort of. I have something to admit: I forgot your kind needs vocal cords to talk, so I've just been offering you some random downsides and powers this whole time. Don't worry, you'll get 'em back after we're done here.

These sacrifices don't take anything from you personally — instead, they ALTER THE WORLD. Pick as many as you want; the more you pick, the weirder your world becomes.

defaultRowText: This is a row, and inside of it, you can place choices. On both rows and choices Requirements can be placed, which will block a row from being viewed, or make the player unable to select a choice, depending on either Point-types or the Ids of other choices. Point-types can be made in Features then Manage Points. Hovering over buttons will explain what they do. The Design of the project can be changed in 'Modify Design' at the side navigation bar, and private styling for each row can be turned on in the rows Settings. Default text like this can be turned off in Features -> Manage Defaults.
defaultChoiceText: This is a Choice, and inside of it, you can place images and text. Scores can be added to it, and have Point-types attached. Addons can be added underneath the image and text. In the Functions at the bottom of the choice, there is an array of different things that can be done. Default text like this can be turned off in Features then Manage Defaults.
